[**July 8, 1776:** The Liberty Bell rang out in Philadelphia, symbolizing the announcement of the Declaration of Independence. The bell's toll served as a powerful signal to the city's residents, gathering them to hear the historic document being read aloud. This event marked a significant moment in American history, signifying the formal break from British rule and the birth of a new nation founded on principles of freedom and independence.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5a076e5f84fa4c2aa97db5cb3a96d0ba&_e=Td7YhbCOOLLKY8FzR2D-YtsyVyfD52T_FlD4SQrHHIyicO8bHMKDHg2Ti5hxAGhaUZ2d3omLGrdIJ-BuJzA8zYNivhDoHXuHFy3ePUY0EYppPGpxuKRd1y7MPwnQnAAevYm6xE3wk5WwSqPhLCFHJNftTRZGEyHJFArgYB-TOiKxTaKbM7O4C67xkDquvkEKNeOh1ARkvxZv8I11icwJJxmhXS_a8lbgoOks3E9FbSOIgdMhmZNYsEhX8YoLYfgBnKkh2Byhmfm3P2c2jEw_63urhhYUtmvT9Sb9gDfu3mk%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5a076e5f84fa4c2aa97db5cb3a96d0ba&_e=Td7YhbCOOLLKY8FzR2D-YtsyVyfD52T_FlD4SQrHHIyicO8bHMKDHg2Ti5hxAGhaUZ2d3omLGrdIJ-BuJzA8zYNivhDoHXuHFy3ePUY0EYppPGpxuKRd1y7MPwnQnAAeryR7gFzpEwycQ5sZCf4Lol51I_aA1q_Cea_x8osNRFsyskjacW0AT3GAU8bGd1cJgPKZ3fTm1xLtsiXLkIhQGRg3tunV11bm8XaNy4UJXp8B1M3C8rXOjw4URlOX2UCqtYnKPk1vtOVPtZleo-fFujxNUSAnc-iVhnAegKlBSoQ%3D)**

[**July 8****, 1889:** During the 1880s, Dow ventured into journalism, relocating to New York City and joining a financial news service as a reporter. Collaborating with Edward D. Jones in 1882, Dow co-founded Dow Jones & Company. This enterprise provided Wall Street financial institutions with timely bulletins, known as "flimsies" or "slips," delivered by messengers. The final delivery each day included a precursor to The Wall Street Journal, a news sheet that would pave the way for the renowned publication.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5a076e5f84fa4c2aa97db5cb3a96d0ba&_e=Td7YhbCOOLLKY8FzR2D-YtsyVyfD52T_FlD4SQrHHIyoOPFslAhbmCLPxAh36w_Jwq-sof-ril6yWsDqBu3BveyYGznKeTI16_eNVjvI7Wea826hOfkBCOSoikEyZO0CACDUoTu8QygvmK4FQ_ye9BPKBNbLMVnERg9a6RvyANrNZ_T9t_RDad2e_xkzhEKS18HB7LD6LB4QPuOYw48uRao-uN83Ak9-9eBM7wQJLRAlcqZrvEwXnnSKvH6MrrDzbzKBke-LTjJ51_xs-MNjEBJQw0iws91KhCFWyclRE32z2X04HIcja2ezwNVLJXSW) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5a076e5f84fa4c2aa97db5cb3a96d0ba&_e=Td7YhbCOOLLKY8FzR2D-YtsyVyfD52T_FlD4SQrHHIyoOPFslAhbmCLPxAh36w_Jwq-sof-ril6yWsDqBu3BveyYGznKeTI16_eNVjvI7Wea826hOfkBCOSoikEyZO0CACDUoTu8QygvmK4FQ_ye9BPKBNbLMVnERg9a6RvyANrEZ6ldLgJUOBMLARQ7RqrzpfvmLCIJWHuK-4eGp37jx3wNO-PX-BZ5k7fBbFadTd6409Ayby_YTncOxk6sIWIk0XoBK-XXBgC0qeSZM_lF6CkYa9LPHrPBqNaHCdIPSAH7M-JC-vJC3Or3LSf9678F)**

**

[**July 8****, 2011:** STS-135, the last flight of the orbiter Atlantis, marked the grand finale of the Space Shuttle program. This historic event, documented by NASA, commemorates the culmination of an era in space exploration. The final mission, undertaken by the Space Shuttle Atlantis, was significant in paving the way for future endeavors and the evolution of spaceflight technologies.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5a076e5f84fa4c2aa97db5cb3a96d0ba&_e=Td7YhbCOOLLKY8FzR2D-YtsyVyfD52T_FlD4SQrHHIzgKRz-lynrWkGTh6QYI0URPSSdYlMTm0PynzSXc_j5FU_7phRvani4nDQWUyAMqP_U8jqlWDiomA7uvZ-Y1Mt_2FsHUvlohxVxBiXKhivRGdBUkKp20Y5Tux47P5Dg2Jd9fFlIP2aXYfihpOyd9uFx98CyiNV8r_W7pR2wnmPxJHngUG9GI_SK_t9Ah6Lf_ZPwbWeSS10d5cFBnGOG3HdU3hwDdyP6ZPToXqMj1XTOM4xYRuQONu2pGjPv3aUOrFc%3D) **Source -[nasa.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5a076e5f84fa4c2aa97db5cb3a96d0ba&_e=Td7YhbCOOLLKY8FzR2D-YtsyVyfD52T_FlD4SQrHHIzgKRz-lynrWkGTh6QYI0URPSSdYlMTm0PynzSXc_j5FU_7phRvani4nDQWUyAMqP_U8jqlWDiomA7uvZ-Y1Mt_2FsHUvlohxVxBiXKhivRGQhFIbCQS4GqlLwLySl5-EKCGUYISPPa32ycac7hY2pF-Jh4qUMNpQJ5yIyAMQzsdVfTFIquANQGBlXEXbrODf7Z6dURSH-R2TGDQm4a-FNn1qg1Oz1nKmJvjkrj4WIkbz1G1VGAy2_8TsbhqgfBh_A%3D)**

body:
You’ve been handpicked as one of our top supporters »
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49171?t=6&akid=9058%2E878179%2EQtXbu1) **Listen, President Biden has been an INCREDIBLE President and defender of our democracy.** [**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49171?t=7&akid=9058%2E878179%2EQtXbu1) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49171?t=8&akid=9058%2E878179%2EQtXbu1)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,**

**_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, especially now that Donald Trump is running for President again.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country! [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49171?t=9&akid=9058%2E878179%2EQtXbu1) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49171?t=10&akid=9058%2E878179%2EQtXbu1)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9058%2E878179%2EQtXbu1). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9058%2E878179%2EQtXbu1).**

name: South Bay CRA
subject: SBCRA July Meeting
body:
Monday July 24th We are excited to host Johnnie Morgan and others at the CRA meeting this month. Make sure to make this meeting as we will also have
| |
---
|
---
## Monday July 24th
---
---
|
---
We are excited to host Johnnie Morgan and others at the CRA meeting this month. Make sure to make this meeting as we will also have our election for our board secretary position.
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Johnnie Morgan, CRA Immediate Past President
---
|
---
A native Californian that attended Los Angeles Unified Schools.
Education includes an A.A. in Business Management from Los Angeles Southwest Community College, a B.S. in Accounting, and a M.P.A. in Public Administration from Pepperdine University.
Worked in several entrepreneurial enterprises over the years, most recently as a consultant in the earthquake preparedness industry.
Has been married 44 years and has two adult children, is a proud husband and father of a Republican household. His motto is: “God will always make a way.”
His active involvement in the Republican Party spans over 40+ years, which includes serving as a California Delegate at the last eight Republican National Conventions.
Served 2 terms as the California Republican Assembly (CRA) National Committeeman and 1 term as the National Federation of Republican Assembly (NFRA) Western Region Vice – President.
Currently, serving as Vice- President of the South Los Angeles-Inglewood Republican Assembly (SLAIRA) and just completed 2 terms as the President of the California Republican Assembly (CRA).
Candidate for the California Republican Party (CAGOP) Los Angeles County Region Vice-President.
---
---
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!

name: American Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661923%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3oRBlshN31BNI7O%2b4jViTw&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661924%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=un9ZR3rG9KlaPMSDOLDH5Q&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661935%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vOA%2fdxYNLlMWT3Zi0Sr6ZA&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661936%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p06udmD668dDKn2dEWN%2bpQ&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661937%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NOJX%2bGw%2bjLvm6TZrmLZIeA&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Update
---

name: American Defense News
subject: WARNING: Move Your Cash Before July 26
body:
There have been a few moments that changed the course of America forever...

| Dear Reader, There have been a few moments that changed the course of America forever... JFK's assassination... 9/11... The Nixon shock of 1971... What's scheduled to take place on July 26, at 2 pm ET, could be another one of those moments. [Click here to see the details...](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z895c4dcd83p820i1f5lhf6vs3uarmp31up844r0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs) Because those who don't prepare could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. Regards, Kendall Castillo
Managing Editor, _Palm Beach Letter_

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmd8930v2p2dn6efcrdda2kt9mc668i3mnhigrrg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zncdq88rfga4qm6qbas4hiksqi3tctomefgj4bb0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg1r13d755rorp7e2gkfaheujg8oqtuuh163c5dg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6e5tae5440b8ma7mniedva7k8mtp1litidsecqo_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg0u6ltm42fuqnf26r0dd26leae4jg5b6983hd68_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6ur2tjmt5us5tu42rn2ci0o8rsnk052npqj8il0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi2s3oulsrbfvo6h098r5i4dkmv2ofqt0lm0m7k8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z25120qqofpfgrkrdukke0o1s191gjsd25bruvpo_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbe7ldi4mgpvcsua18qi157ih9uenkhmou6t0kn8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zglckjidll75697mbvp2ofmlnhubfj7inrk5vdg0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo65s3nmvppgavstkp9d8okprgghncnicqsajd8g_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5u6gj0rrbigehvs2qoa2vsloi3hvedeirk2lu30_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd0j39vlvqd1qabl8ekn6ckpff96uauu19rk6vm0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3q6m3glhhl4l8pig04efn6544baumfeatb4aq70_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2sdeftnfaajf1330l4anbq62setkuo1il0n49b0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Pro Life Update

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: a few pressing matters to update you on:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvo4ihis4ut2qrmbk7fkvt24b98dutisth13lm5o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3fpr1fh3tv3q094bk42tlr4r3po9v446h4ocsd8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zko1uc583orp9g7sc0ld7arplj5evtoj98qqetrg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?")_**
---
**[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk0k0rbh27ae4t2rdj0g7mess64esre0a4gvlqho_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7a3fg8s1dcjbq4klq1p409l63qiqk8pe154a4do_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp0pm7dogvgkcuplsfsk79s9guv8sc2528r78g1o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z21kl7fc8vpp2d4n621i02nfp361q087rqhc124g_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziomrj1unbtub0qj0nr8jhv1vcfdq7qhoepjkfl8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5g99vnfibko17npvb87i96ko5e6tp39h06j7320_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvcmt9hnm5d74n8vhhpl90jlu1d3gh2ggfpp1460_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o71chh2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway
---
* * *
---
|

_Please don 't close out of this email...

Please don't check Facebook...

Please don't ignore this shocking news..._

Joe Biden is mobilizing the Federal Government to empower Chinese nationals to buy up property here on American soil. _Just imagine your neighborhood being carved up by millionaire and billionaire foreign nationals!_

**The Biden Justice Department is in court right now so this is our LAST CHANCE to speak up and help stop them._[Do your part before closing out of this email and sign our official petition to BAN Chinese land buys.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp6pku8fst6mcn6qecoetbepqbmkob1c9rbr9bu0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie6o72c9h2bs "Do your part before closing out of this email and sign our official petition to BAN Chinese land buys.")_**

We're not only taking on China buying up U.S. farmland, now we're also standing up to the Federal Government. It's going to take an OVERWHELMING response to come out on top. **We set a goal of collecting at least 1,000,000 signatures before the end of the day today.**

So can we count on your support before midnight? Your signature is very, VERY important.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zef3u6896u1ld5r9n6gqh7el5o9celqidoqbsk58_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztn7hg8urrbpuqob114vqj5jpc1lhf0ejbovpato_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze8ujvp820md8hkcv6mc672ksc216i9ad6absupg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk7e4fv5sgicer0e5gpjg2eg8iho3m5sr5b2hacg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh82815ft2kljgakk534rmmhq60en46vqcfrtl3o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zacu548jij8n0fcn4l2ge32sca3lfc4hoqpono90_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze5v5ggnlujm45fcs07s1fdhkhhr6skeesrqh6t0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqif9nc1s01j7s2a0f9sqbk9iuarf3kbvjtfg5p8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zajpo9g66f7mdbnp75pngt8sil2515aq7euuni8g_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhi7sk4khm7hkgq096qi5tg098lnakrq33d1hk2g_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg6kigc7p94974370rr1h1um3tiddc7lc3q1o4v0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2vmeegdqbolbsre1gpj6r45p0af10rd14pam4eg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zos2jf9n15in7sbh5gs070dol8um1cq7qc0n0n30_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7eu30apiums1ed1gnh2ep3t50a6nvtsfb7okqqg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zab5ifokoaltqenqs50rgacguuptu9p8e29d1vuo_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z229a2tjofl1j3bef09kqhtfsbaknmvsvtsp1irg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoubrcee3o7oi0n53vlfg0kuimktl5ergctjk288_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuq5iqimqujmc0jiv9d1rco30ouklss59smcspto_rp22sh2s8i66o70s3ie1or0cdh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Your America
subject: Mandatory U.S. Dollar Recall to Begin on July 26?
body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27446%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pYFEroZGpAi2%2b85DZYn65g&sysid=1)** The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. name: Sean Themea
subject: Here is how Biden’s new gun ban scheme works…
body:
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661934%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0bw2S0%2f4ZSzFivLPl069Cw&sysid=1)

Hello Friend,

You can always count on the federal government to make a power grab after a tragedy. Biden is, once again, pushing to “BAN the manufacture and sale” of AR rifles and high-capacity magazines.

When the Federal government wants to disarm law-abiding American patriots, we can’t afford to remain silent.

This is a direct assault on YOUR Constitutional rights. But don’t worry...

**Young Americans for Liberty is on the front lines in the fight for Constitutional rights!**

I am Sean Themea, the Chief Operating Officer at Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the nation’s largest, most active, and most effective youth liberty organization on campus and in American electoral politics.

[You can support Young Americans for Liberty’s fight for liberty and our Constitutional rights on college campuses and beyond. Click here to donate $100, $50, or even just $10 today >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661945%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=baUirNA2qzvp3IO20s0Gkg&sysid=1)

I’m not sure if anti-gun lawmakers know this or if they just don’t care (it’s infinitely worse if they don’t care), but gun bans leave people vulnerable when tragedy happens.

That hasn’t stopped Biden from pushing to disarm Americans -- over the past 30 years, he has made multiple attempts to ban guns.

America needs pro-gun laws because gun bans don’t work right now. Anyone telling you otherwise is lying to you.

But YAL is making a difference!

While gun-grabbers try to take away your guns, our student activists and liberty legislators are ensuring our schools aren't soft targets!

**So far, YAL activists and legislators have passed Constitutional Carry in Indiana, Texas, and Alabama. Young Americans for Liberty has also elected more than 250 hardcore, pro-2A legislators across the country.**

I truly believe YAL’s student activists can make a proactive difference in the fight for gun rights. That’s why I set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of the month to fund our efforts. And with your support, we can give them the resources they need to stand up for the Second Amendment.
[Young Americans for Liberty is winning in the fight for YOUR rights. Please send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount to support a student activist today >>_>_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661946%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RPFXn%2fxsDpWls5jiW4JtJQ&sysid=1)

I don’t believe the Founding Fathers were unclear when they said,
_**"The right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed.”**_
Even a "well-regulated" in the Second Amendment never meant regulated by the government. But if we aren’t careful, the federal government will finally rob us of our rights. And once they are gone, they are much more difficult to get back.

Please help us meet our $50,000 goal before the end of the month. **Just chip in any amount by clicking below.**
[Donate $10](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661947%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vXle1xg60vh9OPGYt10oiQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $35](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661948%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HAhASluMIBFnoYYvDA%2fMig&sysid=1)
[Donate $50](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661949%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gmByHg7heL%2feMOVGw%2fjMAg&sysid=1)
[Donate $100](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661940%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wjU6whOYYBauxAs51ej50g&sysid=1)
[Donate $250](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661941%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wVTtG0KlgpZ4XTVB9q%2bbow&sysid=1)
[Donate $500](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661942%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kym6TKsa8ovJUCpKeRKDXw&sysid=1)
[Donate $1,000](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661943%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V65851PXZz%2bzi47%2flplJtQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $2,500](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661944%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NUZm15jyEJdQxN2RBcgFqQ&sysid=1)
[Donate Any Amount](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661055%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4%2fsuYulI%2bQlZdoYIsjqBJg&sysid=1)
Thank you for your support. I look forward to having you with us.

For Liberty,

Sean Themea
Chief Operating Officer
Young Americans for Liberty

name: Mike Pence
subject: John 3:16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.
{{md5_hash}}
| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9oumdgr3veqkvkvs7qu4mgfom86v1ic29nd6ha8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cdh2bs)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1mrcjaej47oc4gkbef5j0e7ua5k8td84lg93plg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cdh2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zisspbhl6h8n2mqoej714ho2gpeg8uitf1du2mag_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cdh2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm5165gqst4kf8ddcfqv5951nsudbnmtkhresung_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cdh2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1ip26noqpp4b1aqlf4gpmlvsfmc4u09p6vq9g08_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cdh2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z85qv37ln6ufu8db048oeq4vj29n7sdstg3sce8g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cdh2bs)
---

Mike Pence

---
* * *
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztab5crm86sl2vqhu056utmce4sl2233lps2ej30_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cdh2bs)
---

* * *

---

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: a few pressing matters to update you on...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5rlb7rm4b4dqqnqhibm3u4drie2pa1s451st82o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8npvql1tb0o9r9o0nva481lado0nlai6gvi8598_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaj4q61v08e4dn2iokchmqj299pa85enr3t38rl8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zecnn1ok4ulatuh1oq3r29h2ig2m3premtd12f90_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs)[**YES**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuainv8j2jcjqphcffdi63nbdfqp8tmgmbmkbh70_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbi78im47thp1esevhmovu0ni8q33nojul3ihjvo_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcsbus4t7vddpckp11anh7tsh9teeron9certm4g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z397b5bo2is1gnssbq092k09e3ejsb7m9a2sebpg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs)[**YES**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3kpaohaemsnmcb4akou8enp0djlgf3e0lo8qm38_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpjvbes6sj43fvj5v2r7t67rq901t6dmpm4k2v4o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg60ob6cph2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway
---
* * *
---
|
---

---

Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Republicans have an EXTREMELY slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control 2. Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is UNLOADING $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power 3. The latest FEC reports have Democrats OUTRAISING Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House in January When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?" Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies. Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC. They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. That 's why this email is especially important. "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars." If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline. YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you? Thanks for all you do for freedom. - Kellyanne Conway * | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: =?UTF-8?B?SmFtZXMgT+KAmUtlZWZl?=
subject: URGENT: They’re playing for keeps
body:
Hi, I'm James O'Keefe. You may not know me, but you've seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet. | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930849:JSZ-woIgN:m:1:3299561967:5D19354614D471F45F791545388B0672:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930849:JSZ-woIgN:m:1:3299561967:5D19354614D471F45F791545388B0672:r) Dear Patriot,

[**A new lawsuit could crush my investigative reporting at this crucial time for our country. Please help me beat this in court with your critical gift now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930849:JSZ-woIgN:m:1:3299561967:5D19354614D471F45F791545388B0672:r)

Hi, I'm James O'Keefe. You may not know me, but you've seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet.

If you tuned in to the late, great Rush Limbaugh's show five years ago, you heard him say I was "an intrepid 'guerrila journalist' "whose undercover reporting has shown the light of truth on leftist organizations' slimy secrets."

I can't tell you how exciting and encouraging it was hear my hero say that to me!

**Rush and I talked about how important it was to expose the bad guys ... to bypass the lies and spin of the liberal media ... and get the truth to the American people.**

And we talked about the steep price I paid to do that - the attacks, smears, and lawsuits.

Well, the lawsuits haven't stopped.

In fact, a new lawsuit has been filed against me by people I used to work with - people I wish only the best for.

**Let me tell you, this new lawsuit is dangerous, and it could crush my investigative reporting.**

The people who filed it don't just want to beat me by a touchdown ... they aim to smash me flat, and send me off the field on a stretcher.

**I don 't know why they're doing it ... but they're playing for keeps.**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930849:JSZ-woIgN:m:1:3299561967:5D19354614D471F45F791545388B0672:r)** that will quickly pile up.

Fighting this lawsuit will be time consuming and extremely expensive. It may cost $500,000 or more.

But I remember what Rush told me in that interview:

**" You're being attacked precisely because it's important enough to them to silence you. You're being attacked because you're effective, and I hope you continue it."**

[**Will you help me defend myself in court and keep getting the truth to our fellow Americans with your critically important gift right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930849:JSZ-woIgN:m:1:3299561967:5D19354614D471F45F791545388B0672:r)

I hope your answer is an enthusiastic YES!

I can't do it without you.

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

**P.S. this new lawsuit could not only silence me, it could smash me flat.[Please help me defend myself in court with your crucial gift right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62930849:JSZ-woIgN:m:1:3299561967:5D19354614D471F45F791545388B0672:r) **Thank you!
---

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW4Ce19DAN

A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did
Everyone Become a Socialist?"

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW4Ce19DAN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

A few
years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did
Everyone Become a Socialist?"

This is,
of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left
in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and
our way of life.

In a
recent issue of Imprimis-Hillsdale College's digest of
liberty-author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of
the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'-a
two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on
top and socialism for the majority below."

Today, as
a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand
the extent of support for-and opposition to-socialism.

Your
input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight
for the future of liberty in our country.

Will you
please share your views on the political, social, and cultural
forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your
National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62004130:W4Ce19DAN:m:3:2532013465:A1261C8396AD955EE88C842986FA95A4:r

Sadly,
socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the
young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that...

. . .
during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those
16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also
increased in popularity among all ages.

Why is
this?

Draconian
government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated
competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream
come true for corporate socialists.

At the
same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what
socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures
wherever it has been tried.

This is a
result of the far-Left's "long march through the
institutions"-including colleges and universities, K-12 schools,
and the media.

Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once
confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race
theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as
school boards and even the military.

But it is
in our schools where the effects of critical race theory-which
teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens
according to race-are most dangerous.

You may
recall that many young Americans with college degrees who
championed socialist policies participated in the riots and
violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020.

In the
face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free
markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and
teach millions has never been more urgently needed.

That's
why I need your thoughts quickly.

By
responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five
days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent
rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach
increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope
to hear from friends representing every part of the country.

Education
is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your
partnership with Hillsdale College is critical.

As
Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure,
the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."

If you
agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey
on Socialism today.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62004130:W4Ce19DAN:m:3:2532013465:A1261C8396AD955EE88C842986FA95A4:r

Despite
the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember-it is
NEVER too late to defend liberty through education.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: a few pressing matters to update you on...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze4m540kgbr8umkhdknfmb22ucss0kanh93ff7u0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm87jabpbqks1cvor9u5qj6lj4bih3i749cot12o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z95gcsgp13acbtskau6qmckib7t48bdff3r0uusg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?")_**
---
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2om6nmfc16vd99lj129lm2j83gdoau9j8vgc6g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr0b2irek9ik4kg1sokjvulli3171jb517291ss0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zno6ro4pdsogsrq8tsgdvblo1kdktgjn68e30tn8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zukfnnr0pjlrti2qqgg36bmld7a6juu34lv7a6r0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv15mllj55i977f2giecuhbvl5akf32hqa1cpbkg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1otr0i8jnrldadt8o88ajc619h7n4vsj7ilrfv8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoj674ugfhepj9bir0dovpushkm0qco3vr17luao_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o31c9h2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9s7u3no3fi67qhr7svcpju6ud8et15495lu2q40_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o36clh2bs)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6reoa96deqtukh4nref5nbumfqfdhm7i6l6voug_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o36clh2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc45bq06h4ro4vnaaiutvra4svgh01efirklad30_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o36clh2bs)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z25b57c7u8placut42uee445v92d4ou7k0dpvu8o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg62o36clh2bs)
---
| |
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: Mike Pence
subject: John 3:16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.
{{md5_hash}}
| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfluq6hbahhjoebcd674hjgf5b0r3njgamsrume8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6ao72c9h2bs)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp4d8t88f8efi9gg403ce70sq7bojq0l6j5k2g2g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6ao72c9h2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z55d7e0tbookpqrh809akmoqejm3r8g320155tko_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6ao72c9h2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4cupm89p7pfa037hrmaiubeejtdvqvoh21jjpfg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6ao72c9h2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze8j5pcfuus7vq8mlet6dnmqt9s1de1m8fhhj5d8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6ao72c9h2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8qg4jvjma3i2frk3660trnl89369ppcrijlp42g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6ao72c9h2bs)
---

Mike Pence

[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTkwLWRiYWIxZmUxNzJkNjQ0Y2U4NWYyMzkxZWJkMjQ1ODFhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3RoZS1lc3NlbnRpYWwtc2Vjb25kLWFtZW5kbWVudC1lYm9vay8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNlY29uZGFtZW5kbWVudCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkZPNDA3NjIifQ/deB2rIFIAxgG85b_wN1Q5Q)Dear Fellow Patriot,

As the Biden regime continues to chip away at our Second Amendment rights, it's more important than ever to understand the history and principles behind our right to keep and bear arms.

That's why I'm excited to offer you a free copy of "The Essential Second Amendment," a comprehensive guide to the Second Amendment written by Heritage Foundation legal expert Amy Swearer.

In "The Essential Second Amendment," Swearer provides a clear and concise overview of the Second Amendment, from its origins in the English common law to its interpretation by the Supreme Court. She also discusses the latest threats to our Second Amendment rights and offers practical advice on how to protect them.

subject: Rush Limbaugh told me this would happen
body:
Hi, I’m James O’Keefe. You may not know me, but you’ve seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Intern
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z176rtsabcdg7ljnt8r1285q2a478haafaulfjig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tpl64pm4cj464r7dc5jmmom6p5m6ur3cp9j6cqb1obgcqojasb569jm0p1mm8o6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3curm0pjimspmadtie5j31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm1o74s1jm6p34c8iv0)
Hi, I’m James O’Keefe. You may not know me, but you’ve seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet. | | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zicippm69bdssb86ce46cn7fm07a0gpc5srokf88_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6eor4chh2bs)

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z60p8l4i2tjh6d46ns1rj3fujnshlt66bufeq8p0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6eor4chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**A new lawsuit could crush my investigative reporting at this crucial time for our country. Please help me beat this in court with your critical gift of $25, $50, $100 or more now.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9bg69qeks2rukpk343acn3u88543d2jjauscce8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6eor4chh2bs)

Hi, I'm James O'Keefe. You may not know me, but you've seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet.

If you tuned in to the late, great Rush Limbaugh's show five years ago, you heard him say I was "an intrepid 'guerrila journalist' "whose undercover reporting has shown the light of truth on leftist organizations' slimy secrets."

I can't tell you how exciting and encouraging it was hear my hero say that to me!

**Rush and I talked about how important it was to expose the bad guys ... to bypass the lies and spin of the liberal media ... and get the truth to the American people.**

And we talked about the steep price I paid to do that - the attacks, smears, and lawsuits.

Well, the lawsuits haven't stopped.

In fact, a new lawsuit has been filed against me by people I used to work with - people I wish only the best for.

**Let me tell you, this new lawsuit is dangerous, and it could crush my investigative reporting.**

The people who filed it don't just want to beat me by a touchdown ... they aim to smash me flat, and send me off the field on a stretcher.

**I don 't know why they're doing it ... but they're playing for keeps.**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqbm8vbkqesqeac2tkvp1o8qqmqlqqk08af23aeg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6eor4chh2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

Fighting this lawsuit will be time consuming and extremely expensive. It may cost $500,000 or more.

But I remember what Rush told me in that interview:

**" You're being attacked precisely because it's important enough to them to silence you. You're being attacked because you're effective, and I hope you continue it."**

[**Patriot, will you help me defend myself in court and keep getting the truth to our fellow Americans with your critically important gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z34dklekjq8eqj6jar5rjinret175qsh46gr11u8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6eor4chh2bs)

I hope your answer is an enthusiastic YES!

I can't do it without you.

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

**P.S. Patriot, this new lawsuit could not only silence me, it could smash me flat.[Please help me defend myself in court with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqi7bsk10o5f3eo31r638ab2p3808ml2iog5tsq8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg6eor4chh2bs) **Thank you!

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlg842aqgmq7si3nlof4a25r0klk0nopr11uugag_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjg69ob6chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**
