name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=210803c5e3714931884c6a36bc40992c&_e=Y0obiqDbbMzwfba79b2jNMY1vPS6K4RA5WfTcKg5FcsiLQ98IdVyIq_Fna11SDAiocrgomTikU0rplylZUhspfwOS5PcUFTHTKpHQvJQXaYwZUapSTLp2CGmeiPMBOZnFy03xH-fOaROJgxDsGowUW3FJLyXFshsCzavzKecBvYzN248ML5IKUsP2XNHANnMdKgFWC0NPbwtjzLm2w6BfMTOYvwHXjyQbDt0aE1a8bmCRJ3ESY2IMWAyrdJ5TVLQZElbNwyIEDhlm40i9LVNgSJUQTGAIqNU1uh2O3XcVtwe9FXhWqtLc6lPIoxV9SktjiEHWzHX0S3ckVub_j_7LoF-TdtaZ3SV6Yj4mvLksLxhQywIstbYxTiJwVM1m_oqZRW_ckpm6f7YFjHxyFIgjw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=210803c5e3714931884c6a36bc40992c&_e=Y0obiqDbbMzwfba79b2jNMY1vPS6K4RA5WfTcKg5FcsiLQ98IdVyIq_Fna11SDAiocrgomTikU0rplylZUhspfwOS5PcUFTHTKpHQvJQXaYwZUapSTLp2CGmeiPMBOZnFy03xH-fOaROJgxDsGowUW3FJLyXFshsCzavzKecBvYzN248ML5IKUsP2XNHANnMdKgFWC0NPbwtjzLm2w6BfMTOYvwHXjyQbDt0aE1a8bmCRJ3ESY2IMWAyrdJ5TVLQB_gLGJyS02BBthFrDjlqgusAriz-yCEq59cISMrKfpN_DOFv8fPe4-6OlS-4XCAmJHElCuCFz6Gziibs9q6noytsfwgPgJy0CPNILr5mOB4VNOSF9JnwJeM9O342opgUSE0K4vLQZJj52aA7a9bZOQ%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=210803c5e3714931884c6a36bc40992c&_e=Y0obiqDbbMzwfba79b2jNMY1vPS6K4RA5WfTcKg5FcsiLQ98IdVyIq_Fna11SDAiocrgomTikU0rplylZUhspfwOS5PcUFTHTKpHQvJQXaYwZUapSTLp2CGmeiPMBOZnFy03xH-fOaROJgxDsGowUW3FJLyXFshsCzavzKecBvYzN248ML5IKUsP2XNHANnMdKgFWC0NPbwtjzLm2w6BfMTOYvwHXjyQbDt0aE1a8bmCRJ3ESY2IMWAyrdJ5TVLQzX0MKfc0x803v7gspLGPp7FmPGiEGp2byfogJhnDZIWiKrA3fgEECJ6tU-V1a7kg4wwc06-6BSvE_WDm3eJjLie6L3lzShyyeW9oEeYKL7sEz36QdrbzY3rbX8wQD37OV9hccQOqcqrwW0uyJ4MDyw%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37a3c1c9a49e4834b2ffc268e25e9064&_e=CQegf3FFSMoX_KG1EKt3lnNprmjXQSzVpr6JFzyPu1HAquA8sE5nXQMRQGSl8WDKuJRqQ7tYeygVALJ0kXVv7yAONQB2UqAciMu8XTwr0UvLTXPTCfH1dnNcIQWPCROSG_cH-ZjvQocIGY7FzEXsXCNm67utXyRt1-qvFSUeg4tLLRTNw7IymPyAXgS0Pz3-M8rP3KgP45MANi1uOcW1H2QU3HAkYxleGHVJBNYiWku4u1o7Ogpz1AelMqixJXmrpeV6WNWRXVD-X9NvirHOtOeNCkp48OtKvP94KYfiAAU8O8WUD_XK1pMMmPU6r5KwWCPo5t-pp-y1rXE7NJ9Ny_CFCj4qLABBZS7Y2auCRlLY6-qL0KTyhzWI2V-et0ERxyJWwYA1cTSfSnMCVaYSRolgwVZI1MA4fb8DsIue0G1qP5oAiEQERo7F3IBBQLf8PEgbR0iBMkLYRa63wPDnTA%3D%3D "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37a3c1c9a49e4834b2ffc268e25e9064&_e=CQegf3FFSMoX_KG1EKt3lnNprmjXQSzVpr6JFzyPu1HAquA8sE5nXQMRQGSl8WDKuJRqQ7tYeygVALJ0kXVv7yAONQB2UqAciMu8XTwr0UvLTXPTCfH1dnNcIQWPCROSG_cH-ZjvQocIGY7FzEXsXCNm67utXyRt1-qvFSUeg4tLLRTNw7IymPyAXgS0Pz3-M8rP3KgP45MANi1uOcW1H2QU3HAkYxleGHVJBNYiWku4u1o7Ogpz1AelMqixJXmrpeV6WNWRXVD-X9NvirHOtOeNCkp48OtKvP94KYfiAAU8O8WUD_XK1pMMmPU6r5KwDbnndcO3sYmcJ8W57rPenL_ul2QkjdHYGrpn7x9wVKDQRZ_Jdjb_ku80C3Pqv_lYdRRw-FM6RBjzuX7MTx9S6I8y3lco2G6gmB1zxUO_nHZ-vPAzLIDrdzdxvytiV8gUlBjh5gJJGBg0YiFu5rCXgQ%3D%3D "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37a3c1c9a49e4834b2ffc268e25e9064&_e=CQegf3FFSMoX_KG1EKt3lnNprmjXQSzVpr6JFzyPu1HAquA8sE5nXQMRQGSl8WDKuJRqQ7tYeygVALJ0kXVv7yAONQB2UqAciMu8XTwr0UvLTXPTCfH1dnNcIQWPCROSG_cH-ZjvQocIGY7FzEXsXCNm67utXyRt1-qvFSUeg4tLLRTNw7IymPyAXgS0Pz3-M8rP3KgP45MANi1uOcW1H2QU3HAkYxleGHVJBNYiWku4u1o7Ogpz1AelMqixJXmrpeV6WNWRXVD-X9NvirHOtOeNCkp48OtKvP94KYfiAAU8O8WUD_XK1pMMmPU6r5KwaRF8uH9eZ2LgfXliQBdltEbSOdcnRlBaX3Ry9Iyu4-3hAqMaMB_IilfcQoVBZrjHSuPlLFYSI3ANr_6ohsFixkdx_H83BUHl8yY9w1bK27iO0X5RNPzgK9RjgfJGeFkn7ZrFKRxVOu1sm1Rqk0xakw%3D%3D)[**YES**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37a3c1c9a49e4834b2ffc268e25e9064&_e=CQegf3FFSMoX_KG1EKt3lnNprmjXQSzVpr6JFzyPu1HAquA8sE5nXQMRQGSl8WDKuJRqQ7tYeygVALJ0kXVv7yAONQB2UqAciMu8XTwr0UvLTXPTCfH1dnNcIQWPCROSG_cH-ZjvQocIGY7FzEXsXCNm67utXyRt1-qvFSUeg4tLLRTNw7IymPyAXgS0Pz3-M8rP3KgP45MANi1uOcW1H2QU3HAkYxleGHVJBNYiWku4u1o7Ogpz1AelMqixJXmrpeV6WNWRXVD-X9NvirHOtOeNCkp48OtKvP94KYfiAAU8O8WUD_XK1pMMmPU6r5Kw_4AtEHVDrfAe4y8GU7ujL0H_KI0HcYL92BUYJgTuYxkYQXn6xyp1NY5gDbHuNJa9GtD0NSy61_yUG__n5l1sS3ms0B9CZK5L9ukbJAvaWvOgc863J5Yx974iE16iRgu2j302zz6ItqplnMbI-c2CAw%3D%3D) _[**NO**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37a3c1c9a49e4834b2ffc268e25e9064&_e=CQegf3FFSMoX_KG1EKt3lnNprmjXQSzVpr6JFzyPu1HAquA8sE5nXQMRQGSl8WDKuJRqQ7tYeygVALJ0kXVv7yAONQB2UqAciMu8XTwr0UvLTXPTCfH1dnNcIQWPCROSG_cH-ZjvQocIGY7FzEXsXCNm67utXyRt1-qvFSUeg4tLLRTNw7IymPyAXgS0Pz3-M8rP3KgP45MANi1uOcW1H2QU3HAkYxleGHVJBNYiWku4u1o7Ogpz1AelMqixJXmrpeV6WNWRXVD-X9NvirHOtOeNCkp48OtKvP94KYfiAAU8O8WUD_XK1pMMmPU6r5KwIsQt1AAd6r9hSMJngMNG-yHLaWdV6Kv0j0MDrHjrIq02ijOWCIHel1tdjQFIlnNT2QZfFvpgD4x2LzDo7WYTX_iTahAsvNzD3rBFO2WNHXGDkuZCFs6iL41hPTjH3YwZVJuJXEzvDBt2DjJiqsgbdQ%3D%3D)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37a3c1c9a49e4834b2ffc268e25e9064&_e=CQegf3FFSMoX_KG1EKt3lnNprmjXQSzVpr6JFzyPu1HAquA8sE5nXQMRQGSl8WDKuJRqQ7tYeygVALJ0kXVv7yAONQB2UqAciMu8XTwr0UvLTXPTCfH1dnNcIQWPCROSG_cH-ZjvQocIGY7FzEXsXCNm67utXyRt1-qvFSUeg4tLLRTNw7IymPyAXgS0Pz3-M8rP3KgP45MANi1uOcW1H2QU3HAkYxleGHVJBNYiWku4u1o7Ogpz1AelMqixJXmrpeV6WNWRXVD-X9NvirHOtOeNCkp48OtKvP94KYfiAAU8O8WUD_XK1pMMmPU6r5Kwb4M639prSHGzAmozVKc3ZuCdSosko5U5iyaLJ4cknaRMXfQbRy_JclFSp1RiAT5hq9vSB3FixEUTtLxf4Q6N2G_jmCmlp7nI0kQhs-3NVsXXviiRcXKKtnVJI1rOsKF2er7GxTptH-KuTq-CP8MhCQ%3D%3D "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---

clean_body: This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. | | | | | | "Kellyanne Conway" Hey there, it's Kellyanne... "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:" 1. Republicans have an EXTREMELY slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control 2. Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is UNLOADING $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power 3. The latest FEC reports have Democrats OUTRAISING Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House in January When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?" Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies. Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC. They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. That 's why this email is especially important. "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars." If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our June deadline. YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you? Thanks for all you do for freedom. - Kellyanne Conway * | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad85ef703fed458f97d0010b904b9bd8&_e=n4e9KdGA0O92aTHodo8v3fO5g_-IAIAuuYyTqmZ3SnvvH9xMdu3ag9kuRWkpoUBcqb2ubuSfR_GEtsdLgzbll_BnUfgpXzJJFdBPlAq22C1qNUubDO5S81B3Vdcf9FL9AkKQLqjRFmt7Q4qnasvO-e7dZnxbp583A4PJf5ZGCwhwOC-_AgNnPbDzXjn17-4Vr18FXoKQx0MWNhx2UctaVOVbdBRhmAIwYTp5BY81nrjsWSnUx0zg9x86MYaEjIhfa5k4N2utEx2D5tkGz-NPVQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad85ef703fed458f97d0010b904b9bd8&_e=n4e9KdGA0O92aTHodo8v3fO5g_-IAIAuuYyTqmZ3SnvvH9xMdu3ag9kuRWkpoUBcqb2ubuSfR_GEtsdLgzbll_BnUfgpXzJJFdBPlAq22C1qNUubDO5S81B3Vdcf9FL9XhmForlaSH277tRTWTgjlLaKYFIZ2ae25to7mGxCz3-T6Yn1wSelEAScwNJ4m4H70tRlIVwpR4ZmI137i1LIp8f0bjzTkMb9eSZ3DcLmkCfV0EQTE4DZmXLAH_3qH2c5717ZyrKU6dmEjTsM5Jtf2w%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad85ef703fed458f97d0010b904b9bd8&_e=n4e9KdGA0O92aTHodo8v3fO5g_-IAIAuuYyTqmZ3SnvvH9xMdu3ag9kuRWkpoUBcqb2ubuSfR_GEtsdLgzbll_BnUfgpXzJJFdBPlAq22C1qNUubDO5S81B3Vdcf9FL9oaaFH_gqVc2n9uPTYgama5mDpPQA1xZFe4K3vMQjVLAh0zmFZlFQaQj8yGUJ-FzmU-iLadfPR679gA3FUTuNpX16Ij_v7sVa-8MGIkZrRb_EpFspc92NmEVCyKa3ZGG2PV0k3bmoa7D24LIidkXXrw%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Vulnerable bird habitat to be DESTROYED
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867602?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop FRACKING in critical habitat for a _vulnerable bird!_** Picture this: a majestic bird strutting across sagebrush plains. A proud fluffy chest and fancy tail feathers that fan out like sun rays. This is the Greater sage-grouse, an iconic bird of the American West known for its unique courtship dances. But soon, the windswept prairies where this iconic bird lives could be STAINED with _**grimy metallic machines and screeching sounds.**_ Corporate polluters are SO CLOSE to successfully leasing this land to **fracking for profit, DESTROYING public lands and critical habitats!** The Department of Interior could CANCEL this lease sale, **but we’re RUNNING OUT OF TIME!**[**Protect public lands and critical wildlife habitat: send your message to the DOI by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867603?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867604?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This fracking will impact more than just birds, Friend. The wastewater can POISON drinking water for nearby communities, sometimes even containing **RADIOACTIVE WASTE!**
But there’s more. Fracking involves _**blasting high-pressure water into the ground,**_ cracking the Earth, and creating unstable rocks. In some cases, it’s even been known to _**trigger earthquakes!**_
Vulnerable wildlife. Severe health concerns for people. Potential earthquakes. The DOI has more than enough reason to stop corporate polluters from fracking on our public lands -- but it’s**moving forward with this sale anyway![But if just 78 more people from your city send a message to the DOI, we can help push it to PROTECT people and public lands. Add your name by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867605?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867604?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil fuels program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13084670a4ea4369b0a8607942c97690&_e=_7Lt990P9-rqLLfH1hr2LyG0RUz6QxdIgqNVtk0JhWe6URcj_NpEq0HU0Sq8-EhGcEU4YoepZge-zs1shLnXb6_QPzaUtRPAhyUislmuA965qD8ScM8qw4oIgV1_VbIk1tOaLSa0Myzjv0aj-5eDoBhFREju3yGnRBlroxhPTH5WyahvZOtQQGy2g1YHvps-guchWW6BoNHEZHDdnLCL1b9kTSrnKqgZAagFfiOcoVhYfl2njzRHfLUqppWrp0cmuroPLKZY6CaUJR2GzyOl5Geh4KllyCOF8--xQIvyjeQuU4R54Fwhe8zHUgPco6ToAH0naPfgf8fs_IatKaD3cPX3dN9VdzZ223OAKSxxWMIsOrOaUqTSai8DOJrYKSKRD2JiupUrZAWzSbi2NuHhEQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13084670a4ea4369b0a8607942c97690&_e=_7Lt990P9-rqLLfH1hr2LyG0RUz6QxdIgqNVtk0JhWe6URcj_NpEq0HU0Sq8-EhGcEU4YoepZge-zs1shLnXb6_QPzaUtRPAhyUislmuA965qD8ScM8qw4oIgV1_VbIk1tOaLSa0Myzjv0aj-5eDoBhFREju3yGnRBlroxhPTH5WyahvZOtQQGy2g1YHvps-guchWW6BoNHEZHDdnLCL1b9kTSrnKqgZAagFfiOcoVhYfl2njzRHfLUqppWrp0cmfnvQWX9FFFNQqmVKLgM5LdYWVGeRdMSU8jOzi5__qp9pOqf7JdhXBaGKm6Ju1QtS-2x8JvJcyNlr-s7qeQcaDEVk3zIEkgdlGRo5qRcWFeBkHiDN9VjyrPYEnPaMXPgfFWTx13IGeyTD3K-JLKWiAQ%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=13084670a4ea4369b0a8607942c97690&_e=_7Lt990P9-rqLLfH1hr2LyG0RUz6QxdIgqNVtk0JhWe6URcj_NpEq0HU0Sq8-EhGcEU4YoepZge-zs1shLnXb6_QPzaUtRPAhyUislmuA965qD8ScM8qw4oIgV1_VbIk1tOaLSa0Myzjv0aj-5eDoBhFREju3yGnRBlroxhPTH5WyahvZOtQQGy2g1YHvps-guchWW6BoNHEZHDdnLCL1b9kTSrnKqgZAagFfiOcoVhYfl2njzRHfLUqppWrp0cma-b6XaPiUeRTO8A7KulxoUR1jDay8FTcO1h72PM1jH6HPaEvAgXGdpZmpCwM-h_1OrfwmF8RO8hNYyu38k6hOOd0nIdq9N7lfR0oRoog-OLgbJ2lXrFM5wN3wt4fq2NZLelRdclRkMkoF54gqiPQ1w%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=13084670a4ea4369b0a8607942c97690&_t=pXvsYgoTTwBF6dFU3u6eRbYlr0CPSWv0JUPe3pzAyvL1TcV4xSXvo636Dv8RmRYNilLC5eKbVc6rHE5cXvx4baxOhg7new4GpiN-JUHKKIf8JGaohsDIYU0rgaMWXedCaSIzlLFGXBIZTpTLPacEnaeWWIPoKwt0eC44EAKukH8%3D)

clean_body: This is serious. | | | | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend. Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. | So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. "If you chip in just $5 right now," I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? | | You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | | | | Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic. "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY"** | Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS 704C EAST 13TH ST SUITE 260 WHITEFISH, MT 59937 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B76vAua08l-d9hDHyjjDBIFBtEf0AnZq-o-1vAx2J0lOp6bcxYDdJaYn2dfdLJ8xBsX6PuBTFr5mOWzYCdGyvfm3zcIFpF5M_76pnLItBKXkya00BDqPd2QF6WDaKjjNkjJvfirPeTBq3XyvF-BV2gZoYM5IECJug_jiqaG82N9zU%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B76vAua08l-d9hDHyjjDBIFHEHk1znsp6QOLiOg1hgV6xE553cU_Kstm37KRwd9L5r4InvwTIQTrPAyGl8ECr_3ctf99Dv70Pay2ONiftqULsOuKtr-MBXhTwgIMEUDw6Oo6hEgeUoHGu6PdVn-gVurZES60sxSKDIo71PXLZuBhI%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B76vAua08l-d9hDHyjjDBIFFzmXEhdju0ZrlQqyOk9IHySltNzPCF0PjBss142WesxdxJwx1-W2K5nmdbEFv6c3qkXxxY7zEINmokG-GB49LMTMPY2QBeCKjCpftKh7WQgLu_ynMrDNr94yROviwLQjd_EBbQJswClVY611E72VGA%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B76vAua08l-d9hDHyjjDBIFCHGOClOxD819XS8p3zIQuToYUoA1AHNnWvFQEA-cpQxcBY9OHufVRw_IwZv0LHRUJ1KmhY7BvSPMdjkC3yKJ4ZxF_G_1AO7WXCvHeZDlPGiyHNBVpaXigp_JP2Q14rJVy9ArAMNVMadbUf_j-Zl7jc%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B76vAua08l-d9hDHyjjDBIFHR94gKwwH9cOB31inuE8GkcJ_ja-uImRENoewEtLf715SVjle91zTFuDlK7wET2F-cgOjn7a2rTCeapXHLr_xeBuse3FSewV-C2AK6o-QfJtoP3adJ4ZYfD5Xngj6Ru0QxqTo8Zh43PJ0CQxzy3XVM%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B76vAua08l-d9hDHyjjDBIFDK35F2WIdR4172kHNErjsaC3Ne79ndO06kb7HUUvVPKV6hZxmv6B1N2Rtew1OKc-vUMxpLGQMTGcFyUghrxFl4WMAD7VKNuS5A8iCtVllbc39lZMXnyuNMyf0pKXSyPBwiWUAaIdzJhhC-GkxePgo0%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B76vAua08l-d9hDHyjjDBIFAzv1btIEoKDCrsGnn339HTkkD2o2xTfaYHzUMWm0BIoNrzmZbgPqlgT1DbW2gPwtlEho2-P4yXYdetIas9DTtUpZtPJpfZYzX9nDqZ3qMnBXAxPzgBKf18DIfiw3SZBvhwdY53GTsaxUqmmBZTwxNo%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B76vAua08l-d9hDHyjjDBIFLmm4pA6wPpEkvd9bsMu1o4G-X6l5_4CjY0h7DoKifYXX0QxR9R1qSqPvjE8ooacas3mxQndFvOdGgx6NFuJO84zfLYIfaq53QNfG6_4osR-A88OOg9NPxZ8Xc0A0O0QTEEWDZLHUElJbI0qhP_bT6I%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B7bPcTIQ7V9KG7YjfrcMx-uCwuM1gioTEwV-M6FDxWDFIPx8lR8y8HVGTIaG7G72rRNtGTORgYrJ7CYXrzZSRaQ5YNyYGc0zLCb6cX-rbnvLPbJEEHLBNx_kWMua85l7h60bifxNFC9kAlMxSlmIYnAFbrbfEwvg6tSd7z9Nf7sKI%3D)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e7dd8f83e3a470987edb368989e4a53&_e=GBuGfJUOebELAkwEBYqFu-1WJLtjM0ps1UdlFNRienDRMQKAJWi99fAMMEAHNBxXiJ3fog_aPb6RiegOXtdJslVTbe3lyHLGelt6faVDHoK-yu5Q90EfHbdfZiPSK-B76vAua08l-d9hDHyjjDBIFNIM9259oeY2f3CKTzfNjAKjRR4rrdr7fAgG5YAqgG1CDXrVoBXwoiOOqJVsnNVFRzcZMAk-XO633MgqwCUNLig9WJmCTtk1CXx1q5JqL2wD74PsC3-Z2j0HkvoqF2ZmxNbx8slCm839HUm9m7AYFXE%3D)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative State."

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e849bccde1f4cefb807d805bfa68bcd&_e=7ZxxRVaAxhKW4klj7DRRpqdSIgyEcBF5ENwTLHlkVy4WA0hZKFI6JrOf9Ewh_cEU8K_3kWlFmHD20TsM0gHcThkRfNL3jlZqqBToAqHv-hHn5LSKB3XDNQW2zrLA46sWNR3gPcIrzalrkeLguD3sSfkhLVmMBGXY5MY30bG70qn-tCwuh2Mdq-bo1LCg6IONI_C3rVcNOdqg7sL4-Y6-g5q7Qc3VX0GV7RxaWm33iUeP7Ht1AK0b5z6XnB-5L1QlmQzyEEOvSxNXp0s0ENVfJJpcMynCJqSEubT_xesuYcAJGH5gpUN1HGB6oAcZGL0rfcTYnCOaCyIvBOKSQphiGU7jXgTKPzKSMMIvC1H9q3MkZWEyv_Z_EkX_0eHL7Ing-O_s_D6W-I4XgSS5sijUb4qjynyh6PaHktwVw9Lqrcg%3D)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e849bccde1f4cefb807d805bfa68bcd&_e=7ZxxRVaAxhKW4klj7DRRpqdSIgyEcBF5ENwTLHlkVy4WA0hZKFI6JrOf9Ewh_cEU8K_3kWlFmHD20TsM0gHcThkRfNL3jlZqqBToAqHv-hHn5LSKB3XDNQW2zrLA46sWNR3gPcIrzalrkeLguD3sSfkhLVmMBGXY5MY30bG70qn-tCwuh2Mdq-bo1LCg6IONI_C3rVcNOdqg7sL4-Y6-g5q7Qc3VX0GV7RxaWm33iUeP7Ht1AK0b5z6XnB-5L1QlmQzyEEOvSxNXp0s0ENVfJCwDTAkv-11j_NQ0hOUXmuH9Qwb5TFtr6mcqJ03Lhd5XPgEXozw5y5X5EqZgmfBw5VmeeTfOXOPKDCePCCpKgD-YvybiiJ7J_Wsk2sEPb5hgjufYyiyCdC2MJV_sopjJJq0TYCN-Jc-kzEQzcim1UeY%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e849bccde1f4cefb807d805bfa68bcd&_e=7ZxxRVaAxhKW4klj7DRRpqdSIgyEcBF5ENwTLHlkVy4WA0hZKFI6JrOf9Ewh_cEU8K_3kWlFmHD20TsM0gHcThkRfNL3jlZqqBToAqHv-hHn5LSKB3XDNQW2zrLA46sWNR3gPcIrzalrkeLguD3sSfkhLVmMBGXY5MY30bG70qn-tCwuh2Mdq-bo1LCg6IONI_C3rVcNOdqg7sL4-Y6-g5q7Qc3VX0GV7RxaWm33iUeP7Ht1AK0b5z6XnB-5L1QlmQzyEEOvSxNXp0s0ENVfJPx9hlez7g7VaVieYqkzfsfwVPo9xZIAYSeXFKfolkEt4QPi4dMN9MdZLAXVKb27MXxXfHNM7anDhKoLMy1MTnBwtZfq8bLrIQGLazgRQSAWX4B7tBsQuhF2AuPH4PXBSCR9yN2o2b2RpnRP8S4Orbo%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e849bccde1f4cefb807d805bfa68bcd&_e=7ZxxRVaAxhKW4klj7DRRpqdSIgyEcBF5ENwTLHlkVy4WA0hZKFI6JrOf9Ewh_cEU8K_3kWlFmHD20TsM0gHcThkRfNL3jlZqqBToAqHv-hHn5LSKB3XDNQW2zrLA46sWNR3gPcIrzalrkeLguD3sSfkhLVmMBGXY5MY30bG70qn-tCwuh2Mdq-bo1LCg6IONI_C3rVcNOdqg7sL4-Y6-g5q7Qc3VX0GV7RxaWm33iUeP7Ht1AK0b5z6XnB-5L1QlmQzyEEOvSxNXp0s0ENVfJGOu8e-dCmm6YlJFuI6P6O7kC8_6v0SS0rxBIBy22gIN13T25NjUjD_WYJYv30CTy5TgeAHkvEtGG_30xoTWnHXZUvelqhRpDEzat1Eo0ixmyai8ZhLR-yNj615mZxEKe4sF9NA5qDfp4R8_o-aVjTs%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

body:
It appears as if Kari Lake is getting closer to getting into this race, and when she does it will be with the full backing of the MAGA-right.
#

Peter -
We send a good amount of fundraising emails, and we don’t expect you to give to every one that hits your inbox. But we do hope you’ll give to this one.
Please let us explain why:
**FIRST:** It appears as if Kari Lake is getting closer to getting into this race, and when she does it will be with the full backing of the MAGA-right.
**THEN:** An article came out suggesting that Kyrsten Sinema is considering whether or not to run herself — something we really have to be ready for both ways.
**NOW:** We’re approaching the halfway point of July and this quarter has not been off to the kind of start we need.
If everyone reading this email contributed just $10, we’d reach our goals today and have the resources we need to win this race.
But not everyone does give. Which is why we need people who understand the stakes of this race; who understand how important this Senate race is; who understand how important grassroots donations are to our campaign — to chip in.
Can you?

Friend,

That brings their pledged grand total to **$370 MILLION.**

name: Full Mag News
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative State."

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
---
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37bc2a13eb4945018b30342db3a05389&_e=FuWZzCNM12lqXda1C9Om3K02ZdhnZp7xaP1Ina-V2iIIDocXLm8lEk6tbMrMArES-Zn9xMKxqUJmHJtcJicqBXewzF1uE9jRNq--7BfWYwcI3BToHfcrtiTZepeFhPAc72GtMTX8sXOLEVa6Q0CGW8WOCJ_u4NrhC6diCGrkc5ZW_grpr-BpctOCd3EtBqDaSVDysk4CYJybUUL_Z7VhjqWR5PzMFEL0pefMSpyUfiGSzC9nu6M9ofPUr_Tlh7Tbn2spVkRfCQfF7mgb2-ynJ22SikYYgsQSu9KnzrbilYe2s7NbQLjGimB6UHhEOL2HpsZCDAeESHAxhk0hF344xsxChlnpBmQYD3oVns8SBzMSLVWGwXYsx4OmiqUUIImuALXIJ_Ubo-tE1PvghxpijA9FSjfRFkfLAhdERFN0Y2U%3D)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37bc2a13eb4945018b30342db3a05389&_e=FuWZzCNM12lqXda1C9Om3K02ZdhnZp7xaP1Ina-V2iIIDocXLm8lEk6tbMrMArES-Zn9xMKxqUJmHJtcJicqBXewzF1uE9jRNq--7BfWYwcI3BToHfcrtiTZepeFhPAc72GtMTX8sXOLEVa6Q0CGW8WOCJ_u4NrhC6diCGrkc5ZW_grpr-BpctOCd3EtBqDaSVDysk4CYJybUUL_Z7VhjqWR5PzMFEL0pefMSpyUfiGSzC9nu6M9ofPUr_Tlh7Tbn2spVkRfCQfF7mgb2-ynJyDYJ_rIjW2BPtQXz1zIiDTYtJfjz4qlsQHc5LdqKmtBufT37JLSjmxbe_NZJUPWJGC_G4YtX1rVkOP5o7uPt0Qd8l22WnMzCiv9m4QyIoQYLI4mHVhBUw4UgPDxsEebWlgdH4oxlw4MFC4mB-193yA%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37bc2a13eb4945018b30342db3a05389&_e=FuWZzCNM12lqXda1C9Om3K02ZdhnZp7xaP1Ina-V2iIIDocXLm8lEk6tbMrMArES-Zn9xMKxqUJmHJtcJicqBXewzF1uE9jRNq--7BfWYwcI3BToHfcrtiTZepeFhPAc72GtMTX8sXOLEVa6Q0CGW8WOCJ_u4NrhC6diCGrkc5ZW_grpr-BpctOCd3EtBqDaSVDysk4CYJybUUL_Z7VhjqWR5PzMFEL0pefMSpyUfiGSzC9nu6M9ofPUr_Tlh7Tbn2spVkRfCQfF7mgb2-ynJ4SIlsuu6hQXNhNTYeamkIZylYzLsgKUTSQO7cCc1oEeNWZSyJXmtxRsZwt1BvnvQU5N6hmRAfzUnyANhuOe47k9TfIZchqpdAMJaqIeblyUvgSplNkAkvr06hV6xm9HA7SIZeoc6x0FWE46yAwpJak%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37bc2a13eb4945018b30342db3a05389&_e=FuWZzCNM12lqXda1C9Om3K02ZdhnZp7xaP1Ina-V2iIIDocXLm8lEk6tbMrMArES-Zn9xMKxqUJmHJtcJicqBXewzF1uE9jRNq--7BfWYwcI3BToHfcrtiTZepeFhPAc72GtMTX8sXOLEVa6Q0CGW8WOCJ_u4NrhC6diCGrkc5ZW_grpr-BpctOCd3EtBqDaSVDysk4CYJybUUL_Z7VhjqWR5PzMFEL0pefMSpyUfiGSzC9nu6M9ofPUr_Tlh7Tbn2spVkRfCQfF7mgb2-ynJ5pZyboYVz8OVDEljF6RsKGWM4nFxK3sHVeSFIZSQDZYc7NIvE9iNzaoia-vK8ScRMFPhsg8cA9aFERYjFjkwj-PPhZq2oXESLtxLdF4guEIfZbWL-5_rHc_v6ocu_ii3pysIysC2gcEMhJjj290WW0%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.

Friend,
I have to say - I'm disappointed.
This month, our nation witnessed the single worst encroachment by the federal government in American history.
The Biden Department of Justice tried to _**JAIL**_ its leading opponent - _me_ - as an innocent man.
I had hoped that Republicans _everywhere_ would've said it was time to come together as one big, united front to stand against an out-of-control Deep State that MUST be stopped.
But instead, disloyal Republicans devised a **$300 MILLION PLOT** to try and stop us and replace me with a nominee who will make nice with the Deep State.
**Our nation is on the brink of tyranny. We need a man of courage in charge of our country, not a coward who would drop to his knees and surrender to his captor.**
But I know that _you_ have just as much courage as I do, Friend.
You've stood by our campaign through thick and thin, and made our movement stronger than EVER before.
_And in just a few days, we have the chance to show just how strong we are._
On the June 30 FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline, we will prove that not even a sham indictment, an arrest, or even a $300 MILLION PLOT can hurt us.
[**Please make a contribution of any amount to our Primary Victory Fund before the end-of-quarter deadline to counter the $300 MILLION PLOT to stop us in the primary - for 1,500% impact.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsjsp0dvjm83s86bj77784nik9lilsp7j6o6u69g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjh64o36chh2bs)

subject: Urgent Call to Action: Support Legislation to Stop Corporate Price Gouging!
body:
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a280a06-1290-489d-9d41-9a46a457b2c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | Peter, enough is enough! It's time to take a stand against corporate price gouging. Americans are feeling the strain of high inflation. Companies have shamelessly raised consumer prices while enjoying record-breaking profits while everyday Americans struggle to make ends meet. [It's time to hold these corporations accountable. We need 10,000 people to join us before midnight. Will you join us?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te92e308a-6832-4943-9502-b4e80e08bc49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| It's time for Congress to step in and address this issue head-on. We need legislation that puts an end to unchecked corporate greed and protects consumers. [Congress has the power to rein in price gouging and alleviate the financial pressure on hardworking Americans. It's time to demand action!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2463d525-db69-4eee-827d-75e2da0314dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: American Action News
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ps9tii3sp8g5h99hishb0uj1uutsb3j4v2m15g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjh6co71c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z52m6sctt4qo1kev0tr7joneqktcoknfq43sr0d8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjh6co71c9h2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbp75n49jr72pc7lpn3nsk3fr9if5cnll8ch2468_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjh6co71c9h2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn8m2gpumm7sk9tj8sfvomu5v3u4q4rhbgnh6ab0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjh6co71c9h2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqd1i2bdhse5anv85e0pqb51s04dfokjbpcoi9eg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjh6co71c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cpj66pj5c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1iegqu218frqrqfan5d9ahd47htg033bmnme9qg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sjh6co71c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnfkusf2cndg4c4m4eeegptk824im62m1hjv1to_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0s3ie4pj0s5h649fg)

name: Kash Patel
subject: Deep State is haunting the lives of these America-First patriots
body:
This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a8296062434e43dfb444ee5dffa98c44&_e=WYtFoLS5aY84WotzwJDqouSdZ1_xC3diuFo4F5YKT1QnPFRHGXrbv86nzo60MrRcZxBocEENOE0U5O-Wg3ZpzT-JtSuVstqVsQc5VJqszZTbV9NUl6BRpoMxWWKZ2g-m-zwzOnpBxLwgRfp2TBASGKOR190Y98EwexraIhWJHFA4iXz7PkXir9UnCCEMSnFZT9DQmsuw8x2Wh2uhw0cv8PDjx4vD0t44JMGM0ArMmwJfUl5gryeD9YqIpISb2XZd)

Friend,

This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

Why?

Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution.

**_In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman_.** Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a8296062434e43dfb444ee5dffa98c44&_e=WYtFoLS5aY84WotzwJDqouSdZ1_xC3diuFo4F5YKT1QnPFRHGXrbv86nzo60MrRcZxBocEENOE0U5O-Wg3ZpzT-JtSuVstqVsQc5VJqszZSc6tY-FPhdSwgqfdh2JWOJlaTmPqkI9K-zPxJOwAEvFwaiqpNmMBoSekRd5Efh5A-v3_VICXJY4Te9EDrAuImIp286hTcO3OFM5ju-ajjO7E9KDXh3otfd2IYTFFo1CWP4CypmVxYyYfypWKY3NsnT)
You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist.

None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information.

Friend, **I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse.** My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots.

**_Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions_.**

[Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or any amount you can afford to help Kash Foundation serve government whistleblowers? Click here to donate >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a8296062434e43dfb444ee5dffa98c44&_e=WYtFoLS5aY84WotzwJDqouSdZ1_xC3diuFo4F5YKT1QnPFRHGXrbv86nzo60MrRcZxBocEENOE0U5O-Wg3ZpzT-JtSuVstqVsQc5VJqszZTM_XdGH1yl6gXWYYXvcBxS6wBBQ5dIjcCPzYqGh4pJ8FlDnXJGPYBC8gE8A0pGZw9Ils3P2Ehec0bFb0Zuc5J7vLR34_ciw1B5al-s8Lr57bUuIzQk3gjqNUihsGbS6oHL9RJhAvtY_G0BSfBeJDF4)

[Donate](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a8296062434e43dfb444ee5dffa98c44&_e=WYtFoLS5aY84WotzwJDqouSdZ1_xC3diuFo4F5YKT1QnPFRHGXrbv86nzo60MrRcZxBocEENOE0U5O-Wg3ZpzT-JtSuVstqVsQc5VJqszZSLECBJhtjbSZ1soZ6-btXG7Tz3QXF_sENdm-8NoQAk3JGlKeKY1zfJQkD8bv7d3uFH7VX5mKDIlhC2e9yGUcaajoqaXnTZEovMWnufUewrYe0bex737-AXK7MxdzQaMeTkcN3ujm-SUCJj9D9abeki)

Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangster corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments.

If you're a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption.

If you're a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you're innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees.

Without whistleblowers:
* We wouldn't know about Hunter's WhatsApp message.

* We wouldn't know about the corruption at the FBI.

* We wouldn't know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes.

Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us. Or we can fight back. I'm not one for giving up. And I hope you can join me.

[Please donate $10 or more today to the Kash Foundation to help me raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours. Your support will help a whistleblower come forward to expose the corruption. Please select an amount below to donate today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a8296062434e43dfb444ee5dffa98c44&_e=WYtFoLS5aY84WotzwJDqouSdZ1_xC3diuFo4F5YKT1QnPFRHGXrbv86nzo60MrRcZxBocEENOE0U5O-Wg3ZpzT-JtSuVstqVsQc5VJqszZTtdwJjtGidQJNETr4SXUhzojoV4ZUKDUBZbQoC5TOOx8AXALmeTjViFDiCnm7UZMRHSmgzt2D_aPwM9_MS9iOAumNYyYk3XTHaEdn_AC7zjXD1mPFg4hSXMRvcvm8BLf9MFrCuw0Vi5xJOhmyfUHLt)
