clean_body: This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot. Friend, This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot. Why? Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution. In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman. Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid. You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist. None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information. Friend, I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse. My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots. Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions. Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangster corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments. If you're a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption. If you're a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you're innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees. Without whistleblowers: We wouldn't know about Hunter's WhatsApp message. We wouldn't know about the corruption at the FBI. * We wouldn't know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes. Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us. Or we can fight back. I'm not one for giving up. And I hope you can join me. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee under Rep. Nunes and uncovered that the FBI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct. I know what it's like to be targeted by government gangsters. I know how to fight back because I've successfully done this for the last several years exposing the Russiagate hoax. Now, I am counting on your help to expose the corrupt two-tiered system of justice. Thank you, Friend, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbbbdb94731b441cbd31284063f4c123&_e=XfGYapJvPJsVvrNPturBsF6CDh1z9nbP7upKt3Sa4Bumq-SORua0ZT2oNcJn4eUSLj3zZJOqutB5Q2m6FRHVmkJ5abMnciOuB7Yt-0J2RrBRJmFQo2nj8FyhTnzehzvbmReRWULCcNG9kUdAk2-o-vW8V_-ld9xW_8Ql8YjgY6R4yBpz_JCDHzgEcS3wr9xMb5Qda7vLKOWrblKyjIUXZXv9FX99Gf5C0nQVgZqmqzM8NbNsThd3FvjHzoXcU7BPvqHfYw_6pccim9dSkax-5yKlfMn86P6W9ur8rWRLyOIPFphvHp6yGEw2aUCJi0mDK3ik1C-nhhT3AHp0jaw6-zzgu-wPxKOjRUYdePUX-PX9wPFpWxMd2EAKZx0bhI3bCHTgfwySygmOjgHpWJDb6od3A9Ss5W-23TNSHtsDSg-nwseZymfY8hX28s70FhFs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbbbdb94731b441cbd31284063f4c123&_e=XfGYapJvPJsVvrNPturBsF6CDh1z9nbP7upKt3Sa4Bumq-SORua0ZT2oNcJn4eUSLj3zZJOqutB5Q2m6FRHVmkJ5abMnciOuB7Yt-0J2RrBRJmFQo2nj8FyhTnzehzvbmReRWULCcNG9kUdAk2-o-vW8V_-ld9xW_8Ql8YjgY6R4yBpz_JCDHzgEcS3wr9xMb5Qda7vLKOWrblKyjIUXZXv9FX99Gf5C0nQVgZqmqzM8NbNsThd3FvjHzoXcU7BPvqHfYw_6pccim9dSkax-5yKlfMn86P6W9ur8rWRLyOKnb-P2qLecNcNTubKCllipszMPhsis2WRVQ0O3jSwd79j6cLmfOUF86SPKJ4hPLwhZ8utWFp9U5vXyKRlZCYg5m_h6A1bALhCKeuFoN3mCFboFguDAihkVr6tGWlOzj77wlPLnzL3Y37SMRSi3e-jU)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbbbdb94731b441cbd31284063f4c123&_e=XfGYapJvPJsVvrNPturBsF6CDh1z9nbP7upKt3Sa4Bumq-SORua0ZT2oNcJn4eUSLj3zZJOqutB5Q2m6FRHVmkJ5abMnciOuB7Yt-0J2RrBRJmFQo2nj8FyhTnzehzvbmReRWULCcNG9kUdAk2-o-vW8V_-ld9xW_8Ql8YjgY6R4yBpz_JCDHzgEcS3wr9xMb5Qda7vLKOWrblKyjIUXZXv9FX99Gf5C0nQVgZqmqzM8NbNsThd3FvjHzoXcU7BPvqHfYw_6pccim9dSkax-5yKlfMn86P6W9ur8rWRLyOLBd_j0R85OtGtBONYc9XtJQ_x3gVN5cfkk8-dN8kByPa77fAHmybeTFUBqDwUndafbsARpi22--_5DIlyf8xn2HeBGr0Z7x0FguUIfmPHfYnbTrqZvGbKkKLPaWt5muP7cw_uuX4yguCk2_5SaaKm_)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbbbdb94731b441cbd31284063f4c123&_e=XfGYapJvPJsVvrNPturBsF6CDh1z9nbP7upKt3Sa4Bumq-SORua0ZT2oNcJn4eUSLj3zZJOqutB5Q2m6FRHVmkJ5abMnciOuB7Yt-0J2RrBRJmFQo2nj8FyhTnzehzvbmReRWULCcNG9kUdAk2-o-vW8V_-ld9xW_8Ql8YjgY6R4yBpz_JCDHzgEcS3wr9xMb5Qda7vLKOWrblKyjIUXZXv9FX99Gf5C0nQVgZqmqzM8NbNsThd3FvjHzoXcU7BPvqHfYw_6pccim9dSkax-5yKlfMn86P6W9ur8rWRLyOK-9io3A-wMe2JxAsq17WWCNxlCaqlTr9bPb5BTtNIiAmv2WGmt3URPT_Y-Y7pXp7fqpFyCTOntPfcErrMrfKw9tTo9DuLbWK9CFkdGyiuvd0cYXrP9qDf7bCZkcyHDxHC8xJgNPTbchbvnVXAah6qY) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbbbdb94731b441cbd31284063f4c123&_e=XfGYapJvPJsVvrNPturBsF6CDh1z9nbP7upKt3Sa4Bumq-SORua0ZT2oNcJn4eUSLj3zZJOqutB5Q2m6FRHVmkJ5abMnciOuB7Yt-0J2RrBRJmFQo2nj8FyhTnzehzvbmReRWULCcNG9kUdAk2-o-vW8V_-ld9xW_8Ql8YjgY6R4yBpz_JCDHzgEcS3wr9xMb5Qda7vLKOWrblKyjIUXZXv9FX99Gf5C0nQVgZqmqzM8NbNsThd3FvjHzoXcU7BPvqHfYw_6pccim9dSkax-5yKlfMn86P6W9ur8rWRLyOLJBIqRNeBkfA_WkRMNzzgwxedTnZOaF-PY6xF-ShZ-cKty1oFo4_1wrHq-ww6s4LoLkD11gdzi3v4IhUsn2WCsi4WL85vVKxNhDbog0udmtOiGCwpbu3v7EnH-d1B9sKkf4BB-0VomO31izJyaqeqA)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbbbdb94731b441cbd31284063f4c123&_e=XfGYapJvPJsVvrNPturBsF6CDh1z9nbP7upKt3Sa4Bumq-SORua0ZT2oNcJn4eUSLj3zZJOqutB5Q2m6FRHVmkJ5abMnciOuB7Yt-0J2RrBRJmFQo2nj8FyhTnzehzvbmReRWULCcNG9kUdAk2-o-vW8V_-ld9xW_8Ql8YjgY6R4yBpz_JCDHzgEcS3wr9xMb5Qda7vLKOWrblKyjIUXZXv9FX99Gf5C0nQVgZqmqzM8NbNsThd3FvjHzoXcU7BPvqHfYw_6pccim9dSkax-5yKlfMn86P6W9ur8rWRLyOJcOUDYMGOmphp1_U5-OfK7ahkhW4zJOaluLs-ag_mFplHFecIJhQVi8Hug_1RVdVIdz5FOD_8wOuTequGliVd90SIfPuV_u0R5AqHcQcIFY5Sfg6D_FEWOU90UftN3x6rVMNcgafrIC59HQubzbt7E) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:

| Peter,

We know we’ve been emailing you a lot lately, but Republicans are doing everything in their power to stop Democrats from passing life-saving gun safety legislation.

**We know our top supporters know the urgency of the gun violence epidemic in our country, but here are the facts Republicans are ignoring:**
---
| | **1.** Every year, **43,000+ Americans die** from gun violence.

**2.** Guns are now the**leading cause of death** for children under 18.

**3.** In 2023 alone, there have been **more mass shootings than days** this year.
---
At Stop Gun Violence PAC, our mission is simple: recruit and invest in candidates up and down the ballot who will fight to pass life-saving and long-overdue gun violence prevention laws.

But we’re coming up on our weekly deadline, and we’re falling behind on our $10,000 fundraising goal, so we need your help to catch up.

[_**Can we count on you to chip in $10 or more immediately to join the movement to end gun violence? name: Jane Fonda
subject: Why your support counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Every dollar you invest in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC has an immediate impact in the decisions we make, and we cannot do it without you.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66201412/415655700/-1917331050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4M2IxNmVlLTYxMWUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fREDSQsDIsFP_uvQCJHNGj7aGhG9bW0Pqibz4RQH3J8=&emci=bda237b4-ee1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=383b16ee-611e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
---
| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. If you’re reading this, it’s likely you receive a lot of emails from us. I wanted to take a moment to explain why we send them and why your support matters to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and the candidates we support.

_**Here are 3 reasons why every investment counts:**_

1️⃣ _**We rely on grassroots supporters like you.**_ We wish we didn’t have to ask people to part with their hard-earned money, but our ability to support candidates depends on a lot of individuals being willing to support however they can.

2️⃣ _**We focus our support where we can have the biggest impact.**_ Our strategy combines direct financial support and smartly leveraging our ability to reach people in down-ballot races where even modest financial support goes a long way. **And with your support in 2023, we have already been able to fuel the victories of Shontel Lewis and Sarah Parady for Denver City Council, Jalen McKee Rodriguez and Teri Castillo in Texas, and Sara Innamorato in PA, and with your support we will be able to support many more this year.**

3️⃣ _**The climate crisis is here.**_ Day after day, we are seeing the effects of burning fossils on our communities. The fossil fuel industry is dedicated to investing in politicians who will let them continue to get away with it. We can’t take a break from demanding climate action because the climate crisis is getting worse every day. And with your support, I strongly believe the climate movement is in great hands, but there is still so much work to be done.

We don’t say any of this to scare you – anyone who tries to scare you into giving them money should rethink that strategy. If nothing else, our goal is for you to feel hopeful – our team and the rest of the climate movement are working every day out of hope for a livable future, and we hope you consider yourself part of our team.

Every dollar you invest in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC has an immediate impact on the decisions we make, _**and we cannot do it without you.**_ [__**Our next step is to make sure we have the resources to fund our next round of endorsements, so we’re asking today if you can contribute $10 to help us get there.**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66201413/415655701/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230709-z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4M2IxNmVlLTYxMWUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fREDSQsDIsFP_uvQCJHNGj7aGhG9bW0Pqibz4RQH3J8=)

We will continue to share more and more ways that you can support our work other than donating as we gear up for the rest of the year, and we will continue to keep you updated on our progress and opportunities to support our work financially.
---

name: The Team at the Long Run
subject: Trump’s $35 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends -
Donald Trump’s fundraising data was recently released, and the results should put us on high alert:
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.r3wA0I&refcode=em230709-1-tt&t=1&akid=4627%2E196590%2E9hmc6d)
Trump raised $35 million in Q2 of 2023, nearly double what he raised in the first quarter of this year.
This is not good.
Trump has the money and the momentum to not only become the Republican nominee but to take on President Biden once again. And with this kind of money, our democracy is once again on the line.
[**We need to act fast. Can you please split a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford between President Biden’s reelection campaign and The Long Run so we can make sure President Biden stays in the White House?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-biden-split.r3wA0I&refcode=em230709-1-tt&t=2&akid=4627%2E196590%2E9hmc6d)

clean_body: Friends - Donald Trump’s fundraising data was recently released, and the results should put us on high alert: Trump raised $35 million in Q2 of 2023, nearly double what he raised in the first quarter of this year. This is not good. Trump has the money and the momentum to not only become the Republican nominee but to take on President Biden once again. And with this kind of money, our democracy is once again on the line. If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We can’t risk having Trump in office again. So please contribute today if you can. \- The team at the Long Run

Dear Friend,
---
Three years ago TODAY, 300 Believers marched across the Golden Gate Bridge in protest of California's tyrannical mandate against singing in church. In the last three years, God has done infinitely more than we could have ever asked or imagined!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=57e8af95fc9e470f854bb19f27784433&_e=Jl3V99WDkkra2dLsySh7yxX6-0RjZQ3nW7oYCxUymY-vL435RbNoxiHmTqEhmvgUt7g4qYGfNtjQFXO4dWd5Ug-akALDTqFizgQuQSt7wU75oQohMb2dVj_GVRCF96AI_1bEm0wsWZ1Nq5B9GyuBC0i3nXxgUpUuBGzqg_66RKAuRhMjHBqWAJIyW6viS2wlaGfVqoeqtCFHsKlu-HFJ_okff1XvoTe09gLyPdaCXF0u3Skpvnm6tj3WUvTsEZzLgz-scdnl5ENaByEg3lEigkjbUJmnsekJopen_xwRM4Y%3D)
---
Let Us Worship was born out of the desire for Believers in California to gather together and worship the Almighty God, no matter the rules and no matter the costs. We found that that desire was not exclusive to California, but Believers from all across the country desired to see revival come in our nation. God said, "_Go_ _,"_ we said, "_Yes_ _,"_ and the rest is history!
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

But when this public filing deadline passes, these corrupt (and well-funded) enemies of mine are going to dive deep into my fundraising numbers to find any weaknesses they're able to. They're going to want a fight, and I need to show that I have a powerful team standing with me. That's where you come in, Peter.
**I'm counting on dedicated supporters like you to help us hit our goal and show up strong for this major public filing deadline. I _know_ that this team is powerful enough to do it, and missing this public deadline is _not_ an option. So please:**

name: Fair Fight
subject: The GOP presidential candidates’ appalling, shameful, terrible voting records
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
We’ll explain why a few of their records on voting rights are so appalling, shameful, terrible... you name it. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66204715/415669007/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzYyZmQ3OS02YTFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAym75Q6JX6iEjRFNH1CIzj1nRBjNgjXI_nfpYETbXc=&emci=6740b853-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2362fd79-6a1e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | We’ve already got a crowded field of GOP presidential candidates, all vying for victory in the 2024 election. If you keep scrolling, we’ll explain why a few of their records on voting rights are so appalling, shameful, terrible... you name it. [_**And then, we’ll ask you to sign on to show you oppose these GOP candidates’ dangerous anti-voter agendas.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66204716/415669009/-723592420?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzYyZmQ3OS02YTFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAym75Q6JX6iEjRFNH1CIzj1nRBjNgjXI_nfpYETbXc=&emci=6740b853-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2362fd79-6a1e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66204718/415669010/-723592420?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzYyZmQ3OS02YTFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAym75Q6JX6iEjRFNH1CIzj1nRBjNgjXI_nfpYETbXc=&emci=6740b853-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2362fd79-6a1e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
* Mike Pence**touted the voter suppression laws he signed as Governor of Indiana** when he ran for Vice President alongside Donald Trump in 2016. He continued to support Trump’s voter suppression efforts as Vice President.
* Despite narrowly escaping mobs of election-deniers who set out to assault him on January 6, Pence **supported baseless conspiracy theories about “voting irregularities” in the 2020 election.** He later dismissed the insurrection as “one day in January.”
* Pence claimed that the For the People Act, which includes a provision to allow automatic voter registration, would lead to **"millions of illegal immigrants [being] quickly registered to vote.”**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66204720/415669013/-723592420?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzYyZmQ3OS02YTFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAym75Q6JX6iEjRFNH1CIzj1nRBjNgjXI_nfpYETbXc=&emci=6740b853-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2362fd79-6a1e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
* As Governor of South Carolina, Nikki Haley **signed a burdensome and restrictive voter ID law** that the Department of Justice attempted to block, deeming that it was too discriminatory.
* Haley denounced **Congress’ For the People Act,** which aimed to create federal standards to improve voting access for the first time since the Voting Rights Act of 1965, claiming that it was “unconstitutional and unwise.”
* Haley **supported and campaigned for election-denying GOP candidates** in 2022, like Herschel Walker in Georgia, Dr. Oz in Pennsylvania, and more.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66204722/415669015/-723592420?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzYyZmQ3OS02YTFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAym75Q6JX6iEjRFNH1CIzj1nRBjNgjXI_nfpYETbXc=&emci=6740b853-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2362fd79-6a1e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
* As Governor of Florida, Ron DeSantis has **signed several extreme voter suppression bills into law —** including purging eligible voters from the rolls and creating a special law enforcement unit to investigate so-called “election crimes.”
* DeSantis fought to pass a congressional map that intentionally eliminated a district historically held by Black Democrats, **taking away critical representation for Black voters** from Tallahassee to Jacksonville.
* DeSantis **endorsed numerous election-denying GOP candidates in 2022** and undermined the severity of the January 6 attack by doubting whether it should qualify as “insurrection.”

Are you convinced yet that we need to stop these bad actors from bringing their anti-voter agendas into the White House? [_**If you’re with us, please sign your name here to show that you strongly oppose these GOP candidates’ anti-voter extremism. Our team at Fair Fight is working tirelessly to elect voting rights champions in the 2024 election and stop the anti-voter extremism that’s so prevalent and insidious in today’s Republican Party.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66204725/415669017/-723592420?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzYyZmQ3OS02YTFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAym75Q6JX6iEjRFNH1CIzj1nRBjNgjXI_nfpYETbXc=&emci=6740b853-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2362fd79-6a1e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66204740/415669033/-723592420?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230709_e_denouncegop1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzYyZmQ3OS02YTFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAym75Q6JX6iEjRFNH1CIzj1nRBjNgjXI_nfpYETbXc=&emci=6740b853-171c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2362fd79-6a1e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

Thanks for your support!
The Fair Fight Team

name: Amanda Nichols, Communications Director, Our Revolution
subject: FWD: Joe Biden: We can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Did you see Barbara’s email on Friday? Her
story is incredible and I’m so happy she agreed to share it with you.
Volunteers like her — and supporters like you — are what make our work at
Our Rev possible. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8826?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230709_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1008&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]If you have a minute right now, we’d be so grateful
if you could chip in and help us put an end to the crippling debt that
affects millions of Americans like Barbara.

Student loan debt really resonates with me because I have a story like
this of my own. I graduated from college nearly 15 years ago and the
burden of my loans changed the trajectory of my life.

I used to joke that I was bargain-hunting for a degree. I couldn’t have
done it any cheaper, and yet I am likely to be saddled with debt for many
years to come. The main reason is price-gouging of students by colleges
and the predatory lending, interest, and collections practices that come
with it.

We are collecting thousands of stories like mine and Barbara’s because
this has become a pretty typical experience for Americans. But none of us
are asking for handouts, or starting GoFundMe pages. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8826?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230709_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1009&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]We’re asking you
to invest in Our Revolution and the work we’re doing in this pivotal
moment. We have a window of opportunity and President Biden has the power
to deliver for 43 million of us and our families.

I had dreamed of becoming an environmental lawyer, but I simply could not
bring myself to add an extra $200,000 to my debt after racking up $75,000
from undergrad at a state school. Having to give up my dream because of
the price tag was crushing and ate at me for years. I considered an
internship in Washington, DC, but how would I afford to work for free and
live in an expensive big city with student loan payments nearing $900 a
month? Education is supposed to be a ladder, not a weight that holds you
back.

My only choice was to move back home to rural Pennsylvania, where I lived
rent-free with my grandmother while also providing her care. Instead of
paying rent or a mortgage, I paid student loans. I worked as a reporter at
our local newspaper, a job that required a 4-year degree but paid $8 an
hour. After 7 years in the newsroom, I was making $12.25 an hour. Needless
to say, nearly every dollar went to my student loans (and most of that, to
the interest).

It felt like treading water. I got the degree to get the job to pay for
the degree which I needed to have the job to pay for the degree. It was a
road to nowhere.

For millions of people in my generation, entering the workforce in the
aftermath of the 2008 financial crisis, having children, buying a home, or
moving to a city to pursue a new career was out of reach.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8826?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230709_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1010&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]Like Barbara, I welcomed Biden’s student debt payback during the
pandemic — but it was a bandaid on a gunshot wound. Now, Biden has a
second chance to deliver debt relief and Our Revolution is teaming up with
Ro Khanna to help him do it before loans pick back up this fall.

After paying all these years, I’ve whittled my debt down by less than
half. My remaining debt could be much higher now with predatory
compounding interest. But I don’t really know what I owe because I can’t
bear to look at it. Chipping away at a debt, only to see that total going
up is surreal. I know millions of Americans know this feeling too well,
and it is gut wrenching.

No one should be burdened with debt simply for seeking education - whether
at a tech school, community college, or 4-year university. This is a
recipe for disaster for our country, harming our people, our families and
communities, and the economy as a whole.

Today, I’m lucky to be using my degree as the Communications Director for
Our Revolution, where I’m able to work for justice on student debt,
medical debt, the climate, and other critical issues. I’m proud to be part
of Our Revolution’s effort to organize student borrowers from all around
the country to build pressure for change. I am used to helping other
people share their stories, but now I’m hoping my personal experience can
make a difference.

Thank you for being part of our community. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8826?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230709_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1011&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]We can win student debt
relief. Help us mobilize our movement into the next phase of this fight.

In Solidarity,

Amanda

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE

Peter Willis,

I am a lifelong Democratic voter from
Texas and I have a message for the President. Right now I am forced to
choose between paying off nearly $200,000 in student loans vs. supporting
my aging parents and even putting a roof over my head.

I am a volunteer with Our Revolution because I know we must collectively
organize to make our country better. Not just for me, but for the over 40
million Americans with stories just like mine. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8824?t=1012&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]We’re organizing
thousands of Our Rev supporters with student debt to speak out, hold Biden
to his promise, and put pressure on the Department of Education to deliver
relief quickly. Click here to chip in just $3 today to support our work.

I currently owe nearly $200,000 in student debt. In 2006, I left my
master’s program one semester shy of graduating to support my parents. My
father is a Vietnam Vet with PTSD, leaving my mom as the sole-breadwinner.
She couldn’t be home to care for him, so I stopped school to care for my
dad. Today, I support them financially.

Family comes first – I’m sure President Biden and I agree on this. I am
proud of what I have been able to give back to my parents. But it has
meant giving up other parts of my life, including my own ability to save
and invest.

My loans are a burden that I’ve carried my entire adult life. I didn’t
know what it felt like to have financial breathing room until President
Biden paused student loan payments during the pandemic. For the first time
in my life, I was able to save a small nest egg. I was 40 years old.

President Biden, I am not asking for a handout. I am asking for you to
intervene and use your power to improve the lives of millions of Americans
in ways you cannot even begin to imagine. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8824?t=1013&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]Help us organize and tell Joe
Biden: we need meaningful student debt relief TODAY. Click here to give
NOW.

I’ve been nibbling around the edges of this debt for years, using
deferrals and income-based repayment plans that allowed me to keep my
payments down. But all the time, this meant the interest was becoming
insurmountable. Today a third of my total debt is interest.

If my payments start again with no relief, I don’t see a way forward. I
have no path to investing in my own home, or even continuing to support my
parents. How do I better my life if I am trapped under these payments?

That’s why I’m part of Our Revolution’s campaign to End Student Debt.
We’re organizing thousands of people with student debt to demand that Joe
Biden act NOW. We can’t wait for government red tape. The President says
he’ll do everything in his power. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8824?t=1014&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]Help us hold him accountable and make
sure he keeps his word.

It’s not me, Us—

Barbara

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230709_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1001&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230709_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1005&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230709_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1007&akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ ]signing up here.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4434%2E5885482%2Eu-l7xQ

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

subject: Confirm you WON'T vote for Trump -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **ALERT: Recent poll shows 53% of voters "definitely would not" vote for Trump next year -- _but we don't know if YOU are one of them!_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14752?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230709-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230709-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=11273%2E9716520%2E6DncuQ)
**Please confirm before MIDNIGHT:****Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON'T vote for Trump >>**
| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/14752?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230709-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230709-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=11273%2E9716520%2E6DncuQ)
---

Team, this is HUGE: According to a recent poll, **53% of Americans say they _definitely won’t_ vote for Trump for president next year.**

But that's almost IDENTICAL to the number of Americans who voted against Trump in 2016 and 2020 -- which means next year's election could be _**razor-close!**_

If this poll is accurate, we need to lock in as many Democratic votes as possible. We need 85 more people in Pennsylvania to let us know by midnight that they'll NEVER consider voting for Trump. **So please, sign our urgent petition now to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Donald Trump next year:**

**Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON'T vote for Trump >>**
| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/14752?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230709-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230709-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=11273%2E9716520%2E6DncuQ)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Potential opponent with millions to spend defeating Tammy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Eric Hovde can write himself a check for millions of dollars to run attack ads smearing Tammy’s record.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=486%2E35263%2EijkuIV)
Peter, Wealthy Republican businessman Eric Hovde has been mentioned by reporters as a potential opponent in Tammy’s Senate race next year — and he could be prepared to spend _**$20 million**_ of his own personal war chest to attack Tammy and flip this seat. **[Can you rush in $20 so we can stand up to the millions that Hovde or whoever the Republican nominee is will spend to defeat Tammy?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2594?c0=tbe-em-jul23.yxNFuv&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230709_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=486%2E35263%2EijkuIV)** | [DONATE $20](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2594?c0=tbe-em-jul23.yxNFuv&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230709_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=486%2E35263%2EijkuIV)
---
Peter, Eric Hovde is national Republicans’ ideal nominee: They’re actively recruiting wealthy MAGA candidates who can pump tons of their own wealth into tough campaigns without relying on grassroots support.
Eric Hovde is a far-right anti-abortion extremist who spends an awful lot of time at his $10 million ocean-front mansion in California. He’s already endorsed Donald Trump for president and will rubberstamp Mitch McConnell’s far-right agenda if elected to the Senate, undoing all the progress Tammy has made for working families in Wisconsin.
**Facing someone with unlimited fundraising power is a big challenge, Peter.** Eric Hovde can write himself a check for millions of dollars to run attack ads smearing Tammy’s record.
We’re going to need this grassroots team to step up and help our campaign gear up *now* for the incoming wave of Republican spending.
**[Before Hovde makes a decision, we need to rush in support for Tammy’s reelection campaign. Peter, can you chip in $20 or any amount today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2594?c0=tbe-em-jul23.yxNFuv&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230709_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=486%2E35263%2EijkuIV)**

He’s already endorsed Donald Trump for president and will rubberstamp Mitch McConnell’s far-right agenda if elected to the Senate, undoing all the progress Tammy has made for working families in Wisconsin. Facing someone with unlimited fundraising power is a big challenge, Peter. Eric Hovde can write himself a check for millions of dollars to run attack ads smearing Tammy’s record. We’re going to need this grassroots team to step up and help our campaign gear up now for the incoming wave of Republican spending. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you. Together, we’re going to stand up to anyone trying to flip this Senate seat. — Team Baldwin P.O. name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: this wasn’t front-page news, but it matters!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Sometimes it feels like all the news out of Washington, D.C. is negative. And that’s understandable — especially right now, barely a week after the Supreme Court ripped away basic rights and opportunity from so many Americans.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66205359/415671995/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI5YjM4OS02ZDFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYi9HolBI7uOiLcTpOxgd2oxh82Jm7GTKNTkJ7s3a78=&emci=140b90ea-d31c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d4b9b389-6d1e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) Hey team,

Sometimes it feels like all the news out of Washington, D.C. is negative. And that’s understandable — especially right now, barely a week after the Supreme Court ripped away basic rights and opportunity from so many Americans.

But I didn’t run for Congress on a platform of just saying no to bad GOP policies — I campaigned on getting things done to help regular families. And I want you to know that even as we fight back against right-wing extremism, I’m also working hard to deliver progress however I can.

**And though this work often doesn’t make front-page news or trend on Twitter, it really does matter, so I wanted to share a few updates with you. Here are a few of the things I’ve been working on the last few weeks:**
* I’ve introduced several bipartisan bills to respond to our nation’s opioid epidemic — to improve recovery support for people struggling with substance use disorder, to prevent both the financing and the importation of illicit synthetic drugs like fentanyl, and to include naloxone in airplane emergency medical kits to reduce fatal overdoses.
* I worked with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to propose a bill tackling our nationwide affordable housing crisis.
* I proposed a tax credit to help families and small businesses recover from natural disasters.
* I sponsored a measure to hold bank executives accountable by restricting bonus payments for leaders of any large bank that does not resolve serious regulatory concerns in a timely manner.

**[Team, I’m never going to be the kind of elected official who spends all their time commenting on the news cycle — because I’m too busy actually trying to get things done. If that’s the kind of approach you’d like to see more of in Congress, I’d be honored if you would pitch in a few dollars to my re-election campaign →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66205362/415671997/1017531204?refcode=email_070923_frontpage&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI5YjM4OS02ZDFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYi9HolBI7uOiLcTpOxgd2oxh82Jm7GTKNTkJ7s3a78=)** | | [Donate → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66205363/415672000/1017531204?refcode=email_070923_frontpage&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGI5YjM4OS02ZDFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYi9HolBI7uOiLcTpOxgd2oxh82Jm7GTKNTkJ7s3a78=)
---
Thank you,

Brittany Pettersen
_U.S. Congresswoman, Colorado’s 7th District_

| Email is a great way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/y6N32-PBR02A61hdKqQ9kg2?unsubscribedata=0KLXh19J8OEWdg7OYv6vEpgDKBemt9HC%2BS5%2FYQaHw1ZYkcAOoKyK%2B1DXTO%2Bzg0cJGQltkK8%2F%2BHx07Yslz8gvRPFdgc9Nubevm7SS0jNTss%2BvL%2FmwQW33m8o150qQp0tCbwcEK%2BPxI0gf1my51D1rQvw3Rx6tFmR4gQaiZ06DCmJaxAdJbe2%2BfabP22Y7VbAY71jneOVMofHrjCCtl0ejN9hIYvrp%2B8f4dUrGg7aUHpqHNlnvmUjOp592g%2Babj3BaqFlUThWHgkcg6tY%2FCNjOGaLnRrKpKqfrCTGSPKxLWWmRvn7e6OVMO5%2BMCnyYj7AlajaWa9WAupBle6byKS%2Fa3IYP0p8CSbk1mqJ3Z8AHYTNyVPNz24V9GGwGlY4ujCSAvP9tWHCpCFXB2%2BcdnoNOuv%2F19xwq70fGCqZyHfF2QQrUbkRmVXfHtnvUzW4q7Pm4)**.

Peter, last week Michelle had the opportunity to spend the 4th of July in Seguin, TX, in TX-15— home to the largest small town parade — and celebrate the beauty of our district. We don’t want you to miss it, so we’re sharing that beauty and celebration with you — **[but first, we’re going to ask you to make a contribution to help continue funding this campaign. It’s not enough to celebrate our district — we have to keep fighting for it until everyone in TX-15 has the chance to achieve their American Dream. Are you with us?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_oVvfzs1D6lw1QJtZQB_oaTuJ4Vw3IIl93yfSc6m7CskxVMvw9yBh-sSYB2AStzxJTy4awj0oko7_C_hz6bQ5w1HaB9mQqu3pLtbqT1NvntOfUvj3cBBBxydrsgm25C-1Ri8q6UROQg-U7ke_c5U7gPh8THFSuJ2ZPubR7V-zrYzmr1Xixc7eNg1PvPaPZ9Zo6QOvUbLhwquaVsm97RUEGoiMXuWbd8p4eeXBCDnF0b1yFWGxsDhqHL5oJqpMKJD9RgJtj7pnD5KjrW6XNYvr86JAFa7Ri7_uKq27cYS4dE0/3xq/DqAw_h34QRqQfZ1g0E8p9w/h1/m9MCi3f3Hj4fC6CBnB1pK6zp6nC-DyouVwY-NDDVoeA)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_oVvfzs1D6lw1QJtZQB_oaTuJ4Vw3IIl93yfSc6m7CsmgTBuBzNhOognCha_rsmARSIXxUery0iadZ6l-vGlQnjfHCeZHqJN2mJPu6C-IzKtcu8Jn8ySrXEMFzD0QWh_Ibmpvxyu3JkHA-0S5A5ZW8CymFsgO0nnEGuuh6Acf-4UTmJ8ELfbR-3YCEqu_yaOd5w7tNPkX10QL4BUsZ0r4E0wrY3IauSb2SISvKJ2MGmMrlx03kGO9pG6cfBVcXeo8ajXK5H70J7N0H0-KUODs_YA_R4TTXPcSrPzygNAtzAo/3xq/DqAw_h34QRqQfZ1g0E8p9w/h2/ywaTxSFo0ZapM3mVDrC0h9n08A82GzTRsue754P4J-I)

Michelle and Team Vallejo had a blast walking in the parade, meeting folks from Seguin, and celebrating our country and our district on the 4th of July. Our district is full of beautiful diversity, but as we talked to people at the parade, we were reminded that everyone in our district has one thing in common — everyone is looking for the American Dream. And that’s exactly why Michelle is in this fight. She knows that every family deserves the American Dream: a life with economic security, access to quality, affordable healthcare and education, freedom from fear of gun violence, a thriving democracy, and so much more. Meanwhile, Michelle’s opponent, Monica De La Cruz, is actively fighting for policies that would limit our freedoms and make the American Dream harder to achieve. She would limit our freedom to choose, cut benefits for Veterans, and slash Medicare and Social Security. **[TX-15 needs someone who will fight FOR their freedoms and respect the beauty and diversity of our district — and the only person in this race who will do that is Michelle. clean_body: Proud to celebrate our country and keep fighting for it | | | Peter, last week Michelle had the opportunity to spend the 4th of July in Seguin, TX, in TX-15— home to the largest small town parade — and celebrate the beauty of our district. We don’t want you to miss it, so we’re sharing that beauty and celebration with you — Michelle and Team Vallejo had a blast walking in the parade, meeting folks from Seguin, and celebrating our country and our district on the 4th of July. Our district is full of beautiful diversity, but as we talked to people at the parade, we were reminded that everyone in our district has one thing in common — everyone is looking for the American Dream. And that’s exactly why Michelle is in this fight. She knows that every family deserves the American Dream: a life with economic security, access to quality, affordable healthcare and education, freedom from fear of gun violence, a thriving democracy, and so much more. Meanwhile, Michelle’s opponent, Monica De La Cruz, is actively fighting for policies that would limit our freedoms and make the American Dream harder to achieve. She would limit our freedom to choose, cut benefits for Veterans, and slash Medicare and Social Security. ¡Vamos por Quince! Team Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

Fellow American,

When I entered this race, I had never run for office before. I didn’t have years of campaigning under my belt, or a list of political donors to help support my campaign.

I bet most grassroots conservatives only knew my name from _Fox News_ appearances.

But now, 4 months after announcing my campaign for President of the United States, I am climbing in the polls - _even polling ahead of a former Vice President, a sitting U.S. Senator, and multiple governors._

I am proud of the outsider campaign we are running. In addition to the millions my family has personally invested, **[I am counting on folks like YOU to make sure we have what it takes to continue to build on this momentum!](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=fd796d5c6e0a46e4ab5f21c9cea457d3&_e=rVONNB0KBU52kUfyPQty9I1ctfivcNcAxC3EOZ4Dfuiga2HkaqBjUHmiW-T8_geVp-onUEJBe2ZKI04df1FyfPFbFxfow-pojnskGo76MCb6VpnmyNd_KIaLJ9VlahNFrYpTr1UYkN89oOGFaEUlOh47HF-jjXN6aqU37lAM1a8wlPLJZTuzhBPik4J6oXy2_0_1MVzTbIXIflrUx8gTssMYtNiBBW8Jc4mJN1HRcGnv5qyiWjNER5MkMh1ijvVntrRriM1S61fSrWxnlK8DDAvu55ZkkxATQ_GeUOMQOIglydCmzVh6OHQNbvmtDeIyfTVbJ-xBh8-wSYQjTkAv5xdkk8RjETQ1v8ZZGHqO-Ai1Q7s4c37x6BO9byrXzsABjI9g-oonoYU3QHpogQ2JrQ%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: But these TV ads can stop them >> | | Team — BREAKING NEWS out of Ohio: Our friends at One Person, One Vote have officially launched their TV ads to educate voters on just how disastrous passing Issue 1 would be this August. With less than 2 months until this measure’s special election, it’s critical that we can get the word out to every voter possible so that they know exactly what this devastating measure would do to the power of direct democracy in Ohio. = = Friend: Ohio extremists are doing everything they can to mislead voters that Issue 1 would protect voters and further strengthen voting in their state. But we both know that their attempt to pass this 60% supermajority approval threshold is a direct response to a potential abortion protection measure reaching the ballot this November. These extremists are pulling out all the stops to try and keep abortion from being legal in their state — even going so far as to conduct widespread voter suppression by trying to pass this measure. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, friend. name: Sepi Shyne
subject: Our rights don’t begin or end with the Supreme Court
body:
Hi team,

Time and time again, we’re reminded how much work is left to fulfill the promise of the 14th Amendment and the promise of an inclusive democracy.

Last week, the Supreme Court took a sledgehammer to the aspirations of the 14th Amendment by ending affirmative action and sanctioned discrimination against our LGBTQ+ community – one year after ending the Constitutional right to bodily autonomy for child-bearing people.

The thing is, is, our rights don’t begin or end with the Supreme Court, or even in the Constitution. The right to live how we want to live, love who we want to love, the right to health care, the right to housing, and the right to pursue a meaningful life are intrinsically ours, so long as we’re willing to fight for them.

[**I’m running for Congress to fight for the rights of all of us and build upon the work laid out by the 14th Amendment, but I’ll need your support to get there. Chip in $5 or any amount you can on this important anniversary and build an America that works for all of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66206306/415675823/1120139897?refcode=em23_230709_14thAM_fndd_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230709_14thAM_fndd_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9ce633bc-711e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNlNjMzYmMtNzExZS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EDHXtmKDkkZOvUctB_PDymhhnsBEBeQJTnawChQxUhE=)

Over and over again, our political system has stacked the deck against working people, LGBTQ+ voices, people of color, women, immigrants, and marginalized people. And over and over again, people fought back to deliver profound change throughout the course of our country’s history.

>From Stonewall to Civil Rights, from the Labor Movement to the Women’s March, the struggle marches on.

[**We’re literally in a fight for our lives, and I’ll never stop fighting for you. Make a donation of $5 or whatever you can now to get this people-powered campaign to victory in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66206313/415675830/1120139897?refcode=em23_230709_14thAM_fndd_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230709_14thAM_fndd_gq_act___SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9ce633bc-711e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNlNjMzYmMtNzExZS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EDHXtmKDkkZOvUctB_PDymhhnsBEBeQJTnawChQxUhE=)

clean_body: Hi team, Time and time again, we’re reminded how much work is left to fulfill the promise of the 14th Amendment and the promise of an inclusive democracy. Last week, the Supreme Court took a sledgehammer to the aspirations of the 14th Amendment by ending affirmative action and sanctioned discrimination against our LGBTQ+ community – one year after ending the Constitutional right to bodily autonomy for child-bearing people. The thing is, is, our rights don’t begin or end with the Supreme Court, or even in the Constitution. The right to live how we want to live, love who we want to love, the right to health care, the right to housing, and the right to pursue a meaningful life are intrinsically ours, so long as we’re willing to fight for them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Over and over again, our political system has stacked the deck against working people, LGBTQ+ voices, people of color, women, immigrants, and marginalized people. And over and over again, people fought back to deliver profound change throughout the course of our country’s history. From Stonewall to Civil Rights, from the Labor Movement to the Women’s March, the struggle marches on. = With gratitude, Sepi Shyne #WomanLifeFreedom Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. = = Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:
Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Serve America and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: John Lewis: “Freedom is the continuous action we all must take, and each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi team,

Today marks the 155th anniversary of the ratification of the 14th Amendment to the Constitution that guaranteed freedom, due process, and equal protection for all Americans. It was the first clear pathway for formerly enslaved Americans to see a world where they would finally be treated as equal.

As a Black, gay man with working-class roots running for Congress, this campaign represents the power and possibility of our country’s promise. Let’s face it: 155 years ago, my campaign would have been illegal and inconceivable.

[**We’ve made progress since then, but our struggle is far from over. The cornerstone of my campaign is ensuring ALL Americans–regardless of race–are treated equally in the eyes of the law. Too many right-wing extremists want to silence voices like mine, and I need your help fighting back. Chip in $5, or whatever you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66207628/415680563/13284604?refcode=em23_230709_14thAm_fndd_gq_act___CMJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230709_14thAm_fndd_gq_act___CMJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=6bf7f9ab-731e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmY3ZjlhYi03MzFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPHg4bm9Xw22A0b4ow08CIFjm8DvwRSbH-hfbzYq6iI=) ---|---|---|---|---

The passage of the 14th Amendment didn’t come easy, nor has it fulfilled its aspirations. From segregation and Jim Crow, to the battles over voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the rights of women, our work is far from complete.

Freedom, democracy, and justice for all aren’t just pretty words written on parchment. They are calls to action. In the words of John Lewis,_“Freedom is the continuous action we all must take, and each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society.”_

I’m running for Congress to build upon the 14th Amendment’s legacy, and continue the struggles of the many subsequent movements for justice.

We can and WILL enshrine protections for the LGBTQ+ community, codify _Roe v. Wade,_ end racial disparities in our justice system, and create an economy that works for all of us. We just need courageous enough leaders.

clean_body: Hi team, Today marks the 155th anniversary of the ratification of the 14th Amendment to the Constitution that guaranteed freedom, due process, and equal protection for all Americans. It was the first clear pathway for formerly enslaved Americans to see a world where they would finally be treated as equal. As a Black, gay man with working-class roots running for Congress, this campaign represents the power and possibility of our country’s promise. Let’s face it: 155 years ago, my campaign would have been illegal and inconceivable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- The passage of the 14th Amendment didn’t come easy, nor has it fulfilled its aspirations. From segregation and Jim Crow, to the battles over voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the rights of women, our work is far from complete. Freedom, democracy, and justice for all aren’t just pretty words written on parchment. They are calls to action. In the words of John Lewis,“Freedom is the continuous action we all must take, and each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society.” I’m running for Congress to build upon the 14th Amendment’s legacy, and continue the struggles of the many subsequent movements for justice. We can and WILL enshrine protections for the LGBTQ+ community, codify Roe v. Wade, end racial disparities in our justice system, and create an economy that works for all of us. We just need courageous enough leaders. = Thanks, Mondaire = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS

clean_body: Abortion bans defy the will of the people. | | | Friend, Republicans just announced a bill to ban abortion nationwide. | While Republicans announced a national abortion ban to mark one year since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , Democrats introduced a slew of bills to expand abortion rights. We’re aligned with the American people, most of whom support abortion rights. We see this in poll after poll, and in the past year, millions of voters overwhelmingly supported reproductive rights in statewide ballot measures across the country. So when right-wing policymakers enacted near-total abortion bans in 14 states this past year, they defied the will of the people. These abortion bans have disproportionately harmed communities already facing oppression, and a national abortion ban would be absolutely devastating. We’ve got to keep fighting against Republicans’ increasingly fascist agenda to take away our rights. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: This time they’re playing for keeps
body:
| | | | | Support OMG! | Hi, I’m James O’Keefe. You may not know me, but you’ve seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet. | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=62657d9bb0&e=84ee529f47)

[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=5c5bdd98e1&e=84ee529f47) Dear Patriot,

[**A new lawsuit could crush my investigative reporting at this crucial time for our country. Please help me beat this in court with your critical gift of $25, $50, $100 or more now.**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=2e4e5d9448&e=84ee529f47)

Hi, I’m James O’Keefe. You may not know me, but you’ve seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet.

If you tuned in to the late, great Rush Limbaugh’s show five years ago, you heard him say I was “an intrepid ‘guerrila journalist’ “whose undercover reporting has shown the light of truth on leftist organizations' slimy secrets.”

I can’t tell you how exciting and encouraging it was hear my hero say that to me!

**Rush and I talked about how important it was to expose the bad guys ... to bypass the lies and spin of the liberal media ... and get the truth to the American people.**

And we talked about the steep price I paid to do that – the attacks, smears, and lawsuits.

Well, the lawsuits haven’t stopped.

In fact, a new lawsuit has been filed against me by people I used to work with – people I wish only the best for.

**Let me tell you, this new lawsuit is dangerous, and it could crush my investigative reporting.**

The people who filed it don’t just want to beat me by a touchdown ... they aim to smash me flat, and send me off the field on a stretcher.

**I don’t know why they’re doing it ... but they’re playing for keeps.**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d9a7345b10&e=84ee529f47)** that will quickly pile up.

Fighting this lawsuit will be time consuming and extremely expensive. It may cost $500,000 or more.

But I remember what Rush told me in that interview:

**“You're being attacked precisely because it's important enough to them to silence you. You're being attacked because you're effective, and I hope you continue it.”**

[**Patriot, will you help me defend myself in court and keep getting the truth to our fellow Americans with your critically important gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away?**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=a27fdd68ba&e=84ee529f47)

I hope your answer is an enthusiastic YES!

I can’t do it without you.

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

**P.S. Patriot, this new lawsuit could not only silence me, it could smash me flat.[Please help me defend myself in court with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=15d09a10f8&e=84ee529f47) **Thank you!

name: John Fetterman
subject: Student Loans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is just ridiculous.
#
Hey Derek, it's John.
As you probably saw, the Supreme Court issued another extreme ruling.
Our government has spent TRILLIONS bailing out big banks. It canceled MILLIONS in pandemic loans, including ones for Members of Congress. But SCOTUS has decided that we cannot cancel some of the student loan debt that's burdening working people.
**This arbitrary ruling is ridiculous.**
And let's not forget, some of these “justices” have been exposed as taking free vacations, sweetheart real estate deals, and trips on private planes and mega yachts from billionaires with interests before the court. They then are laser-focused on the very extremist agenda those billionaires happen to be pushing.
**Derek, these “justices” have made the Supreme Court into a YOLO court that doesn't care about the rule of law. If they're wondering why so many Americans no longer trust in the institution, they're the reason.**
I'm glad that the Biden administration is finding a new route to try to forgive some student debt, and I'll keep pushing for more relief for working people in the Senate. **[If you can today, chip in so I can keep up that work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230709-1?refcode=em20230709-1-8450&refcode2=8450_434096_Za4eUl&akid=8450%2E434096%2EZa4eUl)**
Thank you for your support 🫶
– John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

clean_body: This is just ridiculous. Hey Derek, it's John. As you probably saw, the Supreme Court issued another extreme ruling. Our government has spent TRILLIONS bailing out big banks. It canceled MILLIONS in pandemic loans, including ones for Members of Congress. But SCOTUS has decided that we cannot cancel some of the student loan debt that's burdening working people. This arbitrary ruling is ridiculous. And let's not forget, some of these “justices” have been exposed as taking free vacations, sweetheart real estate deals, and trips on private planes and mega yachts from billionaires with interests before the court. They then are laser-focused on the very extremist agenda those billionaires happen to be pushing. Derek, these “justices” have made the Supreme Court into a YOLO court that doesn't care about the rule of law. If they're wondering why so many Americans no longer trust in the institution, they're the reason. I'm glad that the Biden administration is finding a new route to try to forgive some student debt, and I'll keep pushing for more relief for working people in the Senate. Thank you for your support 🫶 – John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

For years, Republicans have had the advantage – building their majorities in chambers and destroying progress on abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and gun safety laws. But we are right on their heels – we have shown that when grassroots Democrats stand together, we can get real work done.
**It’s true:** Just this year, we have won 19 special elections, defying odds and breaking barriers for communities. And if we continue to build our grassroots power, there is no stopping what we can do.
**The contrast is clear – Democrats are focused on protecting our rights, while Republicans are doing everything they can to take them away.**

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you
can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help reach our daily
goal of $150,000? [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18991?t=1001&akid=3377%2E346206%2EFnKmho ]Every dollar you can spare will help us build a
people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our
Senate majority. Please donate now →

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18991?t=1002&akid=3377%2E346206%2EFnKmho ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots
movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it.
Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and
Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our
Democratic Senate majority →

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way
to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230709-3377-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3377_346206_FnKmho&akid=3377%2E346206%2EFnKmho

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3377%2E346206%2EFnKmho

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Patriot,

**[House Democrats are gaining ground on Republicans as we head into the 2024 election, and we need your help.](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=dbaa6dbd35854ab9adeaca33d4ef0bda&_e=2GVYSASITH4IwOGtFDGvXZnrkqRr9Za800PcuFAqsA79d625zwKCIX6OfZKWUtdPdrla4Hq36wS3CcnI_YsyKc43qxQoH-K5nwEsiz-w0sWznkXWgGZFwLXRkObRP00qUY7NMl78iMh94ok2xPEsRIO-k3TCy-nv7RJaMzN11AkZw8Sn7W2kNUN4PRUTygABv2lIQaQkYjmDq4IU8Gm_m2aurrGB71tY1zjp1D99OvQjekWJyNjrl6eqqLNGzejau-2FWpxhdw9k9cafB_mtx_z4VKKKIs25T248_xwdFs3mXoqQEY-iar4zkIA8j1AqGU-7XLv6RaO9gInILjHdLWCFqBJJLyPN1ljh_YP27idK3sMDPhzi3D_9RFT-_B5R_3BqzBIoss9lIHLfs2eoMw7XV27mD-SVObfASihAYwf7mmEBfx6y8-ktM6ZerYUPP5-eu8Md8qjl96G5oi63lG-SayAsrC_5c7MdKczCcU7ptP8awMG4q__Msg3eEj2BUjLfs3hsAdvmWKJDWsxpTVcIdc4XaeXAzDHKtsKDgCk%3D)**

**_Without your support, there are a few things will happen:_**

- The Radical Democrats will take back the House Majority.

- Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and Maxine Waters will have an easy road to enact their Socialist Agenda.

- The Border will remain wide open, our police will lose funding, Men will take over Woman's sports, and chaos will continue across America.

name: JD Vance
subject: I’m American - FIRST
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
Here's what I've seen

|
---
Patriot,

_**You know I don 't sugarcoat anything. And, you know when I see something corrupt, I'm the first one to call it out. **_

Since getting to Washington, I've seen a lot of corruption within big banks. I'll be the first to say that the Biden economy has been bad for everybody. I've been screaming it from the rooftops.

But a bad economy is no excuse for corruption. While most American banks are working hard to keep their books in order, we've seen some large banks fail this year. And we've seen executives at those banks cut themselves fat checks while their institutions crashed to the ground. Then, they had the audacity to ask the American taxpayer is left to clean up the mess.

That's not okay with me and it shouldn't be okay with you either. We NEED to stand up for each and every American taxpayer and STOP this cycle of corruption.

Friend, that's why I just wrote a bill to increase responsibility and accountability from big banking institutions. _**Americans need to be protected & the only way to protect the paychecks of hardworking American taxpayers is to make sure the big bank executives have skin in the game. No bonuses for bad bankers. **_

I know the guys at the top won't like it. I don't care. I'm going to do what's fair and right by the American people.

So, I need your help.

**Can you pledge your support to defend American-First values today?**

**[Pledge your support here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f0ca7200388040e58b405ab8d79470e9&_e=KP3wit_pdC6uthkF8rfdtvi4AVWrvuy5ERQKEySg4FHE5CbVoqZqwgB3G6-CttuYgc9RiKFoNDDAlOJPdhpVY9IIZ8rLBJNCX9rvVPCdH_gZ5wu4x3TPTVEH8QR0Ukos7wnef9F6jYkr_C-AImN19-xWuymO9n5C_XVjyAjy4rvtImBv-oKY24KcoG65y5X2s6wZxrNd89jcAhfRoG_2u-B7ekYt4P8SPHrmMagcHfaA8WCekIB3EbMVuXsVlXPLx5qM-ghZPMGE9_LC6wphAGP1_fiNK9VnBXPdU5YkXrHl96YxUJ6xuNp6BygwP4DO)** **We need to protect the American taxpayer, our hard-earned paychecks, and demand accountability and responsibility from Wall Street.**

I need you on my team if I'm going to take on the pushback that's coming for me.

Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

_If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation._ | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f0ca7200388040e58b405ab8d79470e9&_e=KP3wit_pdC6uthkF8rfdtvi4AVWrvuy5ERQKEySg4FHE5CbVoqZqwgB3G6-CttuYgc9RiKFoNDDAlOJPdhpVY9IIZ8rLBJNCX9rvVPCdH_gZ5wu4x3TPTVEH8QR0Ukos7wnef9F6jYkr_C-AImN197LHUsdynAH_Pfl6fAax8FgCDxzWJtz9Dgo-hQnxqZGxUmgNCy0MSDdvyj2ItFi3MuY86REd3bZQr-lhZONXUcr-VTfgPmwfexwOEgfWmz-bnvavNIrc38qUuQBjcsz5HKPE05vxpP-_5MKRxVuz67OEU0CAmHwfCfKfJdntRm5z) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f0ca7200388040e58b405ab8d79470e9&_e=KP3wit_pdC6uthkF8rfdtvi4AVWrvuy5ERQKEySg4FHE5CbVoqZqwgB3G6-CttuYgc9RiKFoNDDAlOJPdhpVY9IIZ8rLBJNCX9rvVPCdH_gZ5wu4x3TPTVEH8QR0Ukos7wnef9F6jYkr_C-AImN195Rf-hdUUxv-J6ulBUtjDoe5NeYSHqxJoqNp_sGkCYjdR_iW5BLBKroFoPdA0asoXmHbWR5ZjF0L3s6V3iwwXEtvNbtMSZfrxzWfN-EQL8oFayO_Csly5Am5VhvkHmDEuMtpvZyqrKwTj_LqbAkSHV6hUsAYXoawY-GtOgBa_1Bj) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f0ca7200388040e58b405ab8d79470e9&_e=KP3wit_pdC6uthkF8rfdtvi4AVWrvuy5ERQKEySg4FHE5CbVoqZqwgB3G6-CttuYgc9RiKFoNDDAlOJPdhpVY9IIZ8rLBJNCX9rvVPCdH_gZ5wu4x3TPTVEH8QR0Ukos7wnef9F6jYkr_C-AImN190TAAupONasl1dt7_ncKwTniyml1LRwxh1tincsyufWg1Jrfi7i8be0nZWV4QOJx4Tyn9s7wNgdPvFUAlS_6G3KEfk10Ixc2YXSkswS2-MogtKoQ_NDYwNQCU4pJgl7eN-ysozDPzyRsA6FyBtbUBMjPr4cp8ctFMqczhGAlNpFs)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Gower Street Apartments
