body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2909%2E5257348%2EI4rEKF ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, as you
probably know, we go to Congress to get things done for the people that
elected us — the people in our district and state! One of the specific
ways we are able to do that is through a process called district
appropriations. Where we can ask for funding for vital projects that
directly help and support our communities.

This year I requested nearly $23 million, with more than $7 million
budgeted to tackle homelessness and housing insecurity, and other amounts
for mental health and substance abuse treatment, for public safety and
other key priorities. And as a senator, I will work tirelessly to continue
bringing vital resources home to help with the real, urgent needs our
communities face, and help other colleagues do the same. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230709_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2909%2E5257348%2EI4rEKF ]To ensure this
happens, can I count on you to chip in to my campaign today to send me to
the U.S. Senate?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230709_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2909%2E5257348%2EI4rEKF ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

This is a major priority for me because we have the opportunity in
Congress to help address homelessness and tackle the challenge of
increasing affordable housing — not only in my state, but in each of our
communities across the country.

For example, right now I’m working to secure $3 million for the Gower
Street Apartments in Hollywood, affordable housing for seniors, many of
whom were previously homeless. The building is old, the elevator often
doesn’t work, and it needs updating. The millions in funding would go
towards updating the original 1930’s building to improve accessibility for
its senior residents.

I’m advocating for these funds because all people, including our seniors,
deserve to have a safe, comfortable, and secure place to live. And this is
just one example of how Congress can help address real world issues on the
ground at home.

The sad truth is that some of my colleagues won’t fight to bring back
resources to their district or state. But for me, being in Congress is
about getting results rather than mere rhetoric. And if it’s a choice
between helping someone get off the street vs. a campaign talking point —
I’m going to pick helping people every day.

If representatives or senators aren’t willing to fight for every dollar
they can to meet the needs of their constituents, then it simply means
that thousands of people that could be living in a home or shelter will
remain on the street. And that makes no sense to me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230709_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2909%2E5257348%2EI4rEKF ]Derek, if
you’re with me, please consider contributing whatever you can afford to
help us grow this campaign, so I can proudly fight as a U.S. Senator for
the resources that will continue to make our communities better and more
affordable for everyone.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, as you probably know, we go to Congress to get things done for the people that elected us — the people in our district and state! One of the specific ways we are able to do that is through a process called district appropriations. Where we can ask for funding for vital projects that directly help and support our communities. This year I requested nearly $23 million, with more than $7 million budgeted to tackle homelessness and housing insecurity, and other amounts for mental health and substance abuse treatment, for public safety and other key priorities. And as a senator, I will work tirelessly to continue bringing vital resources home to help with the real, urgent needs our communities face, and help other colleagues do the same. subject: My story:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66216416/415692607/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.09_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUxN2RjMi04MjFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TilKnxI0SusChhIJmNERoLvijdNULMIVHhUw5gWh7CI=)
I wanted to share a little bit about my story, and why I’m in this fight, Peter. **[I hope you’ll take a moment to read this message, but if you’re already with me, will you chip in to my reelection campaign and support my advocacy for working-class families in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66216422/415692609/535544092?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.09_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUxN2RjMi04MjFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TilKnxI0SusChhIJmNERoLvijdNULMIVHhUw5gWh7CI=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66216425/415692611/535544092?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.09_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUxN2RjMi04MjFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TilKnxI0SusChhIJmNERoLvijdNULMIVHhUw5gWh7CI=)
**Family means everything to me.** My parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, looking for a better life. They knew that hard work and caring for others are the values that build strong communities and families. They raised me and my siblings with those values — on a construction worker’s pay in the Adams County home they still live in.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66216428/415692616/535544092?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.09_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUxN2RjMi04MjFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TilKnxI0SusChhIJmNERoLvijdNULMIVHhUw5gWh7CI=)
**I put myself through undergrad and medical school, becoming the first person in my family to graduate from college.** But even before I finished my medical training, advocacy became an important part of my life. I helped organize my fellow medical residents for better working conditions, and became a union representative with SEIU.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66216430/415692624/535544092?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.09_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUxN2RjMi04MjFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TilKnxI0SusChhIJmNERoLvijdNULMIVHhUw5gWh7CI=)
I chose to be a pediatrician in Adams County to give back to my community – to the folks that raised me. **But I quickly understood that truly helping children required a lot more than what I was able to do as a doctor.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66216432/415692632/535544092?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.09_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUxN2RjMi04MjFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TilKnxI0SusChhIJmNERoLvijdNULMIVHhUw5gWh7CI=)
**That’s why I ran for the state legislature.** In that time, I worked to pass legislation to force drug companies to lower the cost of prescriptions, expand funding for preschool, ensure all Coloradans have access to paid family leave and sick days, and protect renters from eviction during the pandemic.

And, Peter, that’s why I ran for Congress in 2022. The pollsters said I had a 4% shot of winning this race. Thanks to this grassroots movement, we defied the odds and elected the first Latina from Colorado to Congress.

I promise you that I will continue my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado. I will build on my work to lower health care costs, address the high cost of living, and protect a woman’s right to choose. **[I’m ready to continue advocating for Coloradans in Congress, but I can’t beat the far-right or get there alone. Your support was critical last time. So please, will you chip in to my congressional campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66216434/415692640/535544092?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.09_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUxN2RjMi04MjFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TilKnxI0SusChhIJmNERoLvijdNULMIVHhUw5gWh7CI=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

But even before I finished my medical training, advocacy became an important part of my life. I helped organize my fellow medical residents for better working conditions, and became a union representative with SEIU. = I chose to be a pediatrician in Adams County to give back to my community – to the folks that raised me. But I quickly understood that truly helping children required a lot more than what I was able to do as a doctor. = That’s why I ran for the state legislature. In that time, I worked to pass legislation to force drug companies to lower the cost of prescriptions, expand funding for preschool, ensure all Coloradans have access to paid family leave and sick days, and protect renters from eviction during the pandemic. And, Peter, that’s why I ran for Congress in 2022. The pollsters said I had a 4% shot of winning this race. Thanks to this grassroots movement, we defied the odds and elected the first Latina from Colorado to Congress. I promise you that I will continue my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado. I will build on my work to lower health care costs, address the high cost of living, and protect a woman’s right to choose. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=******** Thank you for being a part of my story. \- Yadira | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Karen at United We Dream Action
subject: How would life be different with citizenship?
body:
We are here to stay and we deserve permanent protections. | | | Peter — **11 years after DACA, we’ve been asking the question: How would life be different with citizenship?** 🤔 If I had citizenship instead of temporary DACA protections, I would’ve been able to help care for my grandmother when she first developed Alzheimer’s. It would have given me and my family the chance to say goodbye before she passed away last year. With citizenship, I wouldn’t have any limits on where I’m allowed to travel or what I’m allowed to do because of my status — what jobs I can have, where I can go to school, and more. DACA has changed my life and the lives of so many undocumented people like me, but it’s still not enough. And let’s not forget: **the majority of undocumented youth cannot apply to the program today.** We are here to stay and we deserve permanent protections. United We Dream Action is leading the fight to secure a pathway to citizenship from Congress and the Biden administration, but we need you to join us in this fight: **Will you donate today to support our fight for permanent protections? DACA recipients and all undocumented people deserve more.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8woUN_Ab65s2rQh9LDLPy4yw2kbh0G90EmZCal6ZYZjli6NVpBajiww0KkFdwCtyWZ7jBasQqm_ByEWR21foFLRQVwD-8LtPhqHnjg_w5bYKhXvCUJh_XFbzHm0RNt4Z0GAe0foSdHrcfNFlAdqGnGf4oQaBhEc-tnltEUWgX7qaa8lt21x6iPdfUZ1MOKvQbWyXJJF3NGYYdiZoH-ip2UbRgN9fvRCzcDniYofFnzGWkwGkCiaDeDdgRW48XdqEKmdG8QyrR8wFfJmXbGtPMna2sEGfunb43Dw49_moH-4EdwxdYf-MI3UTFNwdn26MNnn_XfAAMOAV8p-MNTvZJvcLE-hSNvurl8gw51DgRsqgmj-FbyXvXfTlnlErtIGvaB1PC_7nbJnw6vodthSB8eE6brk85FdM4Hw9sTbY-ImQzQ5GlY_X26IU_FBe0ql_XzE-pjK70mcsK1UnSAoEBTlIw8wG4SxJJmdbPDtypsm8/3xq/LcnUqVR3QYCzSP3CPr7frw/h0/y5TNctHH3UdFCnbpa91xmP7eI2VYmmONkjOfHDhElS8)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m used to being written off:
body:
this is personal...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taafa6cb2-4d0d-4501-8b1f-8c2cee9d089f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | I’m used to being written off, Peter. When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could win — especially when an extremely popular challenger jumped into the race. I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said, “Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.” I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my turn?” The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere. I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last time our team would make history. When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we won. Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat in 2024 will be no different, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell. [Together, I know we can defy the odds once again. So Peter, I’m humbly asking: Will you help us protect this seat and the Senate majority with it by splitting a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and Blue Amp Action? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf993424-5e84-44dc-94cc-ffe9dc60b947/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Thank you for being part of our woman-led movement to transform politics for good! Emerge is working tirelessly to ramp up our programs and help MORE Democratic women run for office and WIN at every level, and we’re so glad you’re with us.
| | |

Dear Peter,

Thank you for being part of our woman-led movement to transform politics for good! Emerge is working tirelessly to ramp up our programs and help MORE Democratic women run for office and WIN at every level, and we’re so glad you’re with us. [**But before we give you our mid-year update, please take a moment to add your name to Emerge's official pledge to support Democratic women running for office**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66219057/415698923/-150463858?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1250-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyY2JlYzkzLThiMWUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=53VKOMuDHZrwen-zLxqyrPOyxu9Y9lxptaHTPcJoi_Y=&emci=4204d021-4a1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=52cbec93-8b1e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818).

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: cancer medication + Big Pharma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — our politicians are allowing a dangerous drug cartel to get away with letting Americans die. **That cartel is called Big Pharma.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34826?refcode=em20230709-3374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3374%2E614464%2E1jZKE3)
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in anything you can toward my grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat for the people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34826?refcode=em20230709-3374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3374%2E614464%2E1jZKE3) But first, will you give me a moment to explain?**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34826?refcode=em20230709-3374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3374%2E614464%2E1jZKE3)**
In America, just three wholesalers control 90% of drug distribution for pharmacies.
A handful of giant overseas companies control 80% of our drug supply chain.
And now, drug shortages are up 30%.
**People will die, but Big Pharma will STILL manage to pull in record profits.** That’s what monopoly power looks like.
Meanwhile, the facts are clear: We CAN make these essential drugs in America and get them to those who need them — but Big Pharma chooses not to.
**To their top executives, record-breaking profits matter more than the drug shortages that cost Americans their lives and livelihoods.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34826?refcode=em20230709-3374&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3374%2E614464%2E1jZKE3)
And why haven’t our politicians done anything big about this? **Money.**

I’m not afraid to call these companies out for what they are: **A dangerous cartel that’s exploiting everyday Americans.**
When I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, I’ll work to do more than just break up Big Pharma and make sure Americans can access the life-saving drugs they need — I’ll fight to see these corrupt corporations prosecuted for what they've done to us.

clean_body: Peter — our politicians are allowing a dangerous drug cartel to get away with letting Americans die. That cartel is called Big Pharma. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to But first, will you give me a moment to explain? In America, just three wholesalers control 90% of drug distribution for pharmacies. A handful of giant overseas companies control 80% of our drug supply chain. And now, drug shortages are up 30%. People will die, but Big Pharma will STILL manage to pull in record profits. That’s what monopoly power looks like. Meanwhile, the facts are clear: We CAN make these essential drugs in America and get them to those who need them — but Big Pharma chooses not to. To their top executives, record-breaking profits matter more than the drug shortages that cost Americans their lives and livelihoods. And why haven’t our politicians done anything big about this? Money. It’s the reason why I don’t take a cent from Big Pharma execs in this Senate campaign — and the reason why I’m fighting to ban stocks for members of Congress, including fake “blind” trusts. When we cut through the corporate corruption that’s gripping Washington, there is so much we can achieve for Missouri and our entire country — creating jobs, getting people the medications they need at a price they can afford, and building up the American workers and businesses that make our nation strong. But it won’t be possible without your help, Peter. I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them.

Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities — it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda.

**That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz — to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz.** [Will you please split a donation of $10 today between our campaign and The Collective PAC to help send me to the Senate? →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAiSOhwIjqTin-AAlvHk3iAmmCGdDC5eBC5TJSnmsJz5ZISxUmK7C0EHTnX_MzQqx95iyqgY6nt7opEDalPrR7d_3w0Qi5oIRg6ETXIe1NWmatXAcq0pGtT73QmDFOugtEMyDFrqgMzfuHZJq0IT4KHGLtI97rCrrD5oxmK-_xPf1ZHyPbx_EMJqXUuxEmFFpnbO-1NBD9loV6v-swclkl9XZMQCG3slvDuzPHr5xeoRlhrhgEUdiKHfiH5VpWVgrrQb486ffo1l1Al4tIBvsikgOqEZtRu_hqM7azdMUkGSj0IfLhVB4_ysZlcNdFdyRoLmojIvaHJsyH-hU_9njOdpR2mftqY1RYvYb9SdEZBYX-exIaPZPRQ8yfiEyYQT7E34RvIe76XJaw9TkoIqkpemx-vQIZHW2qx-_AqecotOZdZBAlyHjJ0amnMgbntsj-XmCqj1571bmt3Rlhi91EwQ/3xq/sznKav1oRAyBvP1h9zJCuQ/h3/aSLtJszrPCphirO5_GS6c97cWYdT2MxyXeiDuo8Vx9Y)

clean_body: we have a real chance to win this thing | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them. Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities — it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda. That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz — to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change. But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to be by my side every step of the way. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Every dollar makes a difference — thank you so much for giving what you can. Colin The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: Four months until Election Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
This race remain tight. We have just four months until Election Day, Peter, and this race is tight.

**A Republican firm released a poll that shows Andy and his opponent are tied.** We knew this was coming – Andy won by just over 5,000 votes in 2019 and election experts are calling this the most competitive race in the nation this year.

We'll be frank: in a race like ours, we know it's going to be close until the very end. Every single day counts, and we're working in overdrive to reach Kentuckians across the Commonwealth to share why we need to re-elect Andy – but the work ahead won't be easy.

**[That's where you come in, Peter. Will you make a donation right away to help ensure our team has the resources to spread Andy's message across the Commonwealth so we can win this tough race? The dollar amount isn't as important as the donation itself — this is a grassroots campaign, and the number of folks showing up to support us is what really name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name for ethics reform at the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Americans should be able to have faith in SCOTUS.
#
Peter,
I have made my position about Supreme Court ethics reform very clear in recent weeks as we heard revelation after revelation about undisclosed travel and gifts between Justices and wealthy donors:
**If Chief Justice John Roberts will not take action to solve this issue, then Congress will.**
This session of the Supreme Court is officially over — and we have yet to see any steps taken towards reform. That’s why the Senate Judiciary Committee will now begin marking up legislation that will create an enforceable code of ethics for Supreme Court Justices, just like every other federal judge.
**[If you agree that the highest court in the land shouldn’t have the lowest ethical standards, add your name to my petition now to support Democrats’ Supreme Court ethics reform.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66219869/415703680/-1117589624?refcode=dd_em_230709_1_t1_a&ms=dd_em_230709_1_t1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjU5MGQ2Ny05MzFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kOwmTzelvtbSOmGsJpgOrt8u-WoIFzJN33nd7tEvFx4=&emci=69590d67-931e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=76590d67-931e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
According to news reports, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell is threatening a Republican filibuster of our bill, claiming that Democrats should “stay out” of the Supreme Court’s business.
Well, I happen to believe that ethics in our courts — especially the highest court in the land — is everyone’s business. Americans should be able to have faith that the Supreme Court is fair, impartial, and adherent to a strong code of ethical conduct. We intend to make that a reality.

clean_body: Americans should be able to have faith in SCOTUS. Peter, I have made my position about Supreme Court ethics reform very clear in recent weeks as we heard revelation after revelation about undisclosed travel and gifts between Justices and wealthy donors: If Chief Justice John Roberts will not take action to solve this issue, then Congress will. This session of the Supreme Court is officially over — and we have yet to see any steps taken towards reform. That’s why the Senate Judiciary Committee will now begin marking up legislation that will create an enforceable code of ethics for Supreme Court Justices, just like every other federal judge. According to news reports, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell is threatening a Republican filibuster of our bill, claiming that Democrats should “stay out” of the Supreme Court’s business. Well, I happen to believe that ethics in our courts — especially the highest court in the land — is everyone’s business. Americans should be able to have faith that the Supreme Court is fair, impartial, and adherent to a strong code of ethical conduct. We intend to make that a reality. My best, Dick Durbin ** ******** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

subject: This headline says it all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

---
It’s true, team,

**FIRST,** the Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s congressional maps for illegally diluting the power of Black votes. The Court’s decision has forced Alabama to draw new maps with an additional majority-Black district – and experts predicted the ruling could “shake up” the 2024 election by leading to _even more_ states being required to redraw their maps.

**THEN,** just a few weeks later, the Court issued another decision clearing the way for Louisiana to draw new maps with an additional district where Black voters can elect the candidate of their choosing.

**AND,** similar challenges in Arkansas, Georgia, South Carolina, and Texas could lead to more gerrymandered maps being struck down. In fact, so many states could be impacted that _FiveThirtyEight_ said, **“this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.”**

****SO NOW,** we need to double down on our efforts to secure fair maps across the country!**
[PITCH IN!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66220332/415706656/1153222191?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230709_FR_7J_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhN2JiNjU5LTk1MWUtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZExzvgNyNIJZeZXC1aCw-fvGQPMpGBfmr8oXBVNxLRQ=)
---
**“Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered . . . are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around.”

“But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state.”

– President Obama**
---
President Obama is right, team – and we’re counting on your grassroots support to make sure we can continue the work.
**Please: Will you pitch in now to help us combat GOP gerrymandering and secure fair maps across the country?**

clean_body: | | = It’s true, team, FIRST, the Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s congressional maps for illegally diluting the power of Black votes. The Court’s decision has forced Alabama to draw new maps with an additional majority-Black district – and experts predicted the ruling could “shake up” the 2024 election by leading to even more states being required to redraw their maps. THEN, just a few weeks later, the Court issued another decision clearing the way for Louisiana to draw new maps with an additional district where Black voters can elect the candidate of their choosing. AND, similar challenges in Arkansas, Georgia, South Carolina, and Texas could lead to more gerrymandered maps being struck down. In fact, so many states could be impacted that FiveThirtyEight said, “this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.” **SO NOW, we need to double down on our efforts to secure fair maps across the country! = “Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered . . . are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around.” “But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state.” – President Obama President Obama is right, team – and we’re counting on your grassroots support to make sure we can continue the work. Please: Will you pitch in now to help us combat GOP gerrymandering and secure fair maps across the country? name: GIFFORDS
subject: Let’s finish the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
So much of our ability to do our lifesaving work depends on donations from concerned people like you
#

Hi there, we hope you’re having a relaxing Sunday.
We don’t want to take up too much of your time today, [**but we’re humbly asking you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC if you’re able to.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230709-1-15&t=1&akid=6113%2E3935704%2EE4iiER)
Here’s why:
Gun deaths have reached historically high levels. Gun deaths increased 24% from 2019 to 2021, and now more than 43,000 Americans die from gun violence per year. The threat of gun violence exists everywhere—in our supermarkets, our places of worship, our movie theaters, our schools, our concerts. The list goes on and on.
Our nation deserves better. Our future generations deserve better. We cannot give up in the fight to end gun violence.
So much of our ability to do our lifesaving work depends on donations from concerned people like you—people who are devoted to our mission of keeping our communities safe.
[**So please. Make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today. It’s going to take all of us pitching in to finish the fight to end gun violence in America.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230709-1-15&t=2&akid=6113%2E3935704%2EE4iiER)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: Making tax law interesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26234%2E3422442%2Ejc3juN)
Derek, as a former teacher, Katie loves breaking down the latest issues. Today, we’re looking ahead to an upcoming Supreme Court case.
The case: _Moore v. United States_
The basics: The Court will rule on a portion of Trump’s 2017 tax law regarding American taxpayers who own more than 10% of a foreign corporation.
The broader implications: Simply put, this case is being brought to the Supreme Court by conservatives who hope to make it illegal to pay their fair share. **The Court’s decision will affect our tax code and could determine the fate of wealth and billionaire tax proposals.**
Derek, this important case will be decided by the same justices who have taken lavish trips at the expense of billionaires and Republican mega-donors.
**Ultra-wealthy Republicans see folks like Katie in Congress and realize their days of huge tax breaks and loopholes could come to an end. They’re fighting back, but Katie won’t back down.**
Now more than ever we need leaders like Katie in Washington fighting against corruption and corporate special interests. [**Consider helping power our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230709-1?refcode=EMAJ09_1_TAX_20230709_V1_F&refcode2=26234_3422442_jc3juN&akid=26234%2E3422442%2Ejc3juN)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230709-1?refcode=EMAJ09_1_TAX_20230709_V1_F&refcode2=26234_3422442_jc3juN&akid=26234%2E3422442%2Ejc3juN)**
Thanks for your support,
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ09_1_TAX_20230709_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26234_3422442_jc3juN&akid=26234%2E3422442%2Ejc3juN)**
---

Katie Porter for Senate

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |

---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=de080b9a6db941e4940747bfa20273d8&_e=wLXXYcLkf2i3NeJrgB0c5RwjnvaQXr7WhTrxjPxYSu8APgany0v984fM30ihq4vY3xn9XslVhic8MeiCkUnvOE5U9uTjdVqsoPZwr-DFL76Eb99n3rYSfK8z5JD0bkNBiF4tRa0SeqaRHYcZQATo7-1MqaD5GBb5JVXAPh7XnfxVL3hpVrJeF9RPL5b-dNyqx7vcaBrL1elqYaKeXTPL8BXZYOGBHDf7UacO_3JoOmscyGIKKiEb4WhLDaVd8o04VLADPWYH20pHmnOcl7fisBo7NbtgHFR4isftnfB489qiuMBdw9ETWuBIUn9juHkWl6rWjVIEUt1bWvwrBj4gDEzjG6qWhQGFXZvCXBcwQ1H9EH_hC2vFMyKGbnIVJkLkEbr68cLfYJ19marvJ7jrTidle-owBFP18NjojaOZ0D8%3D "Can you handle the truth? I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here 's the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here 's the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here 's how we'll WIN: **This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

_**[Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=de080b9a6db941e4940747bfa20273d8&_e=wLXXYcLkf2i3NeJrgB0c5RwjnvaQXr7WhTrxjPxYSu8APgany0v984fM30ihq4vY3xn9XslVhic8MeiCkUnvOE5U9uTjdVqsoPZwr-DFL76Eb99n3rYSfK8z5JD0bkNBiF4tRa0SeqaRHYcZQATo7-1MqaD5GBb5JVXAPh7XnfxVL3hpVrJeF9RPL5b-dNyqx7vcaBrL1elqYaKeXTPL8BXZYOGBHDf7UacO_3JoOmscyGIKKiEb4WhLDaVd8o04VLADPWYH20pHmnOcl7fisHzUdjieH66xzqdROYPYFgtT8f3xpEFn-VoPkGluxojDFDNCt23D72LxZi3LbfmM9-n9Hakr39-WhZSPNWnNmf3TCF2pz05fMrTVUZV9aNhzxPB7edV0OgCU1ShEsqLCSUrPSPwxt-SmMSN6MSBatKY%3D "Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.")**_
---
| | | [INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12 >>](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=de080b9a6db941e4940747bfa20273d8&_e=wLXXYcLkf2i3NeJrgB0c5RwjnvaQXr7WhTrxjPxYSu8APgany0v984fM30ihq4vY3xn9XslVhic8MeiCkUnvOE5U9uTjdVqsoPZwr-DFL76Eb99n3rYSfK8z5JD0bkNBiF4tRa0SeqaRHYcZQATo7-1MqaD5GBb5JVXAPh7XnfxVL3hpVrJeF9RPL5b-dNyqx7vcaBrL1elqYaKeXTPL8BXZYOGBHDf7UacO_3JoOmscyGIKKiEb4WhLDaVd8o04VLADPWYH20pHmnOcl7fisOWxxToKV4tb7cW7sqgRMUgxH1OWcqJxkMF--O4fnGUDQ-pEDfEWYSMmzH-rAiuE-PFBCbyVbWUK6B2jmDvQJ2ja2681aeUUT8RH_h4TomGBdT0AZtlAjg00v7sqkpynRRiUp2h9fpPwNcDi16pTk48%3D "INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12 >>")
---
Thanks for listening to me, I hope you take what I said to heart and take action right away.

**The future of our country is counting on you. **

Thanks,
John Kennedy
(R-Louisiana)

---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: STOP the bear slaughter before it’s too late
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867765?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **POV: You are a mama grizzly bear.** You and your cubs roam across the vast Yellowstone National Park; you find home in its dramatic canyons, alpine rivers, lush forests, hot springs, gushing geysers, and abundance of wildlife. _This land was made for you to thrive in its ecosystem _as top of the food chain._ _ On a warm summer's day, you're on the daily search to find a meal for your hungry cubs, but this time you wander just a bit outside of Yellowstone's borders -- _with no idea that vicious trophy hunters are waiting to slaughter you._ Out in the open lies a meal on the forest floor. Curious, you begin to examine the potential meal when loud **SHARP** sounds fill the forest air. You _**COLLAPSE**_ to the ground and cry in agony as intense pain spreads across your large 700-pound body -- your blood **SPLATTERED** across the forest soil. You have been shot _**MULTIPLE**_ times. You cannot move, and it is getting harder to breathe. **You are dying.** Your bear cubs, confused and scared, are now left to STARVE and will soon die without their mother. Friend, not too long ago, the bloody carcass of a mangled grizzly bear was discovered _just 14 miles away from Yellowstone,_ and it likely suffered a similar horrific fate. [**This may not be the last grizzly death due to the Endangered Species Act rollbacks by GOP lawmakers and hunting lobbyists. Will you take action now to help protect grizzly bears from cruel hunting practices?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867766?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867767?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_It takes one bullet, Friend._ One bullet to kill a mama bear and leave her orphaned cubs to survive on their own with a very _**low chance** _of survival without their mama. No one to help defend them from predators, provide food for nourishment, and provide shelter for their protection and growth.
Trophy hunters prowl through regions like the Northern Rockies states that border Yellowstone -- where there is currently a lack of federal safeguards to keep grizzly bears safe, **KILLING OFF** these innocent mammals as a vicious game.
Grizzly bears are one of the most iconic representations of North American wilderness. But **less than 2,000 of these beloved bears** are left in the lower 48 states. And if endangered protections of grizzlies are removed, barbaric trophy killings like these will only increase -- including methods like**cruel baiting, painful trapping, and violent shooting.**[**And grizzly bears' chances of survival will dramatically decrease. Friend, please act now to help save grizzly bears from extinction driven by savage trophy hunting >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867768?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1867767?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting grizzly bears and the planet,
Friends of the Earth**
|

No one to help defend them from predators, provide food for nourishment, and provide shelter for their protection and growth. Trophy hunters prowl through regions like the Northern Rockies states that border Yellowstone -- where there is currently a lack of federal safeguards to keep grizzly bears safe, KILLING OFF these innocent mammals as a vicious game. Grizzly bears are one of the most iconic representations of North American wilderness. But less than 2,000 of these beloved bears are left in the lower 48 states. And if endangered protections of grizzlies are removed, barbaric trophy killings like these will only increase -- including methods likecruel baiting, painful trapping, and violent shooting.== == Thank you for protecting grizzly bears and the planet, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

**_...a big, beautiful Donor Wall dedicated to our most loyal supporters who are the backbone of this campaign._**

clean_body: Would you like to reserve your space on our beautiful Donor Wall? | | | Friend, When I attended the grand opening of our First-In-The Nation Primary Headquarters in New Hampshire, I immediately looked for a way to honor ALL of our incredible grassroots donors who made it a reality. It’s because of YOU that our campaign holds MASSIVE LEADS in all the early primary states. We’re leading by more than 30 points in Iowa... More than 30 points in New Hampshire... 30 points in Nevada... And more than 20 points in South Carolina. And so, it’s YOUR NAME I want finely etched into our beautiful Donor Wall Plaque in our HQ! I’ve even picked out a spot just for YOU , Friend. OR... Thank you, - Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Thu, Jul 6, 2023 Subject: Recognizing YOUR NAME in our HQ To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Friend, At the end of June, I attended the GRAND OPENING of our campaign headquarters in the FIRST-IN-THE-NATION primary state of New Hampshire. While I was touring the building and thanking our many staffers and volunteers, I noticed a big wall that looked a bit empty. I thought to myself – you know what would be great there... ...a big, beautiful Donor Wall dedicated to our most loyal supporters who are the backbone of this campaign. And I don’t mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within. I’d love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I’m asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall. But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I’ll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed beside our Donor Wall Plaque. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

[**July 9****, 1776:** On July 9th, in New York, Washington had the Declaration read to his gathered troops. Later that night, the Americans took down a bronze and lead statue of King George III (1738-1820), situated at the Bowling Green's base on Broadway, symbolizing their defiance. Washington's own copy of the Dunlap printing of the Declaration of Independence is now preserved in the Manuscript Division's George Washington Papers.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1150dd208ff64e7a80091dd3bcac04b1&_e=1CFdezENb5tiSyPOCrCpt_puGEDX8u0bs_YdtiSgtuiVFAiS-kHlrATNvq9gaSvq-ZKE5T0uxdyWSJ0BClzGJOekuROaah5JUalYqDWUpZ2LkWJh5hBkX3jba7jqiCe-f3muvmrM0I-JogokPmXDxQw3UUtbl32EyS_4ezbC-tR0gWcmIx8xPN8bn9-6A_EZwPripOfrJ4RTF7_pk0pMYz72rHmZCww0TwTOA35oNo4G5SkHd3riHlT20aSgTUzjnlAcZhUlEiMAX4VXbv5NFdM-0BkRhJGhxceIDtZySYWK_YsEqa2A19u-K9sW6osw) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1150dd208ff64e7a80091dd3bcac04b1&_e=1CFdezENb5tiSyPOCrCpt_puGEDX8u0bs_YdtiSgtuiVFAiS-kHlrATNvq9gaSvq-ZKE5T0uxdyWSJ0BClzGJOekuROaah5JUalYqDWUpZ2LkWJh5hBkX3jba7jqiCe-f3muvmrM0I-JogokPmXDxRKCampGrAOQpDfq__jt72JUZUWLeF4Lpk2_PQKcMHyi71aPoJPUPZ6aR4-56xO1AsA9Ty1fAmLpnHVaAGh8RhU7Mo5mED78OdwenfJXXVRqc_V6C3xDG1jUXdWF_KEIVzEdgf4acIMjCpIPj3cWSPDLOFuZ4UruRQmgoArmwYSA)**

[**July 9, 1862:** Morgan's Raiders embarked on their raid into Kentucky, having crossed over from Tennessee. They launched an attack on the 9th Pennsylvania Cavalry stationed at a USA garrison. During the assault, the Raiders managed to capture 30 soldiers who were retreating, while also causing significant damage by destroying tents and stores Eventually, they returned to Tennessee, leaving a trail of disruption in their wake.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1150dd208ff64e7a80091dd3bcac04b1&_e=1CFdezENb5tiSyPOCrCpt_puGEDX8u0bs_YdtiSgtuh8hjrrUgm3l1WWNYrQGdO6LCn62BsebWTDk5Qq9bL4fIrn04-XA8BBpRsWxNSYTJIphb3jWhBMNX-L46IH3z7qsDdPgpZxRhz0QqNb4-BpydofyRbDwm_VcRQa8Fi8SjHyQ4hY6HWSV17st3AlMt6bcTSwHv9iFvtunpwnImqiMuMYV2FDt2AgKbsi2eFMWC_RgXWjD5QsQW1NNpaL32s4nN1Jgh8YT71pnlBXQPs9JMJJt9si8UY2_mIId4n28ts%3D) **Source -[explorekyhistory.ky.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1150dd208ff64e7a80091dd3bcac04b1&_e=1CFdezENb5tiSyPOCrCpt_puGEDX8u0bs_YdtiSgtuh8hjrrUgm3l1WWNYrQGdO6LCn62BsebWTDk5Qq9bL4fIrn04-XA8BBpRsWxNSYTJIphb3jWhBMNX-L46IH3z7qgoHU5ZsmxsvOvOTdRyzD4Z7GBTlvlv3Y7GfVJGPnluVcXwhuumrU80XUgXIcaJgsdggzgq6t-51BWsHP90gcukj4bNdjCa22_g0gCfF7t5Ydf3LOt5Id5eNiI04vRMK7XoNg1L9X5lWfJZ25WD5NmuKVuHx_mOhVn5lmdluzJYo%3D)**

[**July 9,****2002****:** The annual MLB All-Star Game took place, which later became known as the "All-Star Game fiasco." The game ended in a 7-7 tie after 11 innings, as both teams ran out of available pitchers. This unprecedented result sparked controversy and disappointment among players, fans, and officials, as the game was meant to determine home-field advantage in the World Series. The tie led to significant changes in the All-Star Game format, ensuring that such a situation would not occur again in the future.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1150dd208ff64e7a80091dd3bcac04b1&_e=1CFdezENb5tiSyPOCrCpt_puGEDX8u0bs_YdtiSgtuhrdVYqhGmLUEIeBKWK_njb7_YfnyzjWgcOXwZa21vIVYgqevFwUFKpSS3p7umy4eqkPU0ml76ALQ6SacnKU64vNqrfvv4VR7IpujQEnbLe0ihnfHqt8wKiBdz3yysDjrMpv_3_4x31YjTrmwgUGCUB60JsKhfDVo9IxHqKZ3p6DtzL_efABK5Pil1B0llOVGQEV6pRUo9vklqq5gHJM2V2Nv4quh9vD4M5LKB-LNG-h2uq0ukM_4xezYrAWolhLh4leigF8rhOzMua4OIDgt_JwQNqsmL_FkY_-4WQkwRfFw%3D%3D) **Source -[espn.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1150dd208ff64e7a80091dd3bcac04b1&_e=1CFdezENb5tiSyPOCrCpt_puGEDX8u0bs_YdtiSgtuhrdVYqhGmLUEIeBKWK_njb7_YfnyzjWgcOXwZa21vIVYgqevFwUFKpSS3p7umy4eqkPU0ml76ALQ6SacnKU64vNqrfvv4VR7IpujQEnbLe0ihnfHqt8wKiBdz3yysDjrMpv_3_4x31YjTrmwgUGCUBUfz83IL26k7bXr0IF7OG1JZVLFqEY0giLhb4_IE1Gd3dGayGV_m023CEwgt6idEuq2kcxOgujNEjZxIkwOqELlAemDJlZ3fg-XEo3R_flukJ7sCdE4VYa5rwfb9ujwA055_Mnb6y-q7JPjgrZBCtKA%3D%3D)**

body:
We’re honored that thousands of supporters like you have already become Founding Donors to the Biden-Harris campaign. But we’d love to see even more names on the list. | | |
---
Peter, In the months since President Biden and Vice President Harris announced their reelection campaign, we’ve seen a _huge_ groundswell of support. It’s clearer than ever: People all over the country are ready to keep building on the progress we’ve made. We’re honored that thousands of your fellow supporters have already become Founding Donors to the Biden-Harris campaign. But we’d love to see even more names on the list -- **so we’ve extended the deadline to become a Founding Donor until Friday at midnight.** And now, we’re asking: **[Will you become a Biden-Harris Founding Donor? clean_body: We’re honored that thousands of supporters like you have already become Founding Donors to the Biden-Harris campaign. But we’d love to see even more names on the list. | | | Peter, In the months since President Biden and Vice President Harris announced their reelection campaign, we’ve seen a huge groundswell of support. It’s clearer than ever: People all over the country are ready to keep building on the progress we’ve made. We’re honored that thousands of your fellow supporters have already become Founding Donors to the Biden-Harris campaign. But we’d love to see even more names on the list -- so we’ve extended the deadline to become a Founding Donor until Friday at midnight. And now, we’re asking: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Founding Donors are the backbone of this campaign, Peter. By making a contribution today, you’re not only making a statement that you believe in a brighter future for our country, but you’re also helping make that vision possible: Your support helps us lay the groundwork to reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris, as we scale up our organizing efforts, ensure the Biden-Harris campaign’s message reaches communities across the country, and more. This is your chance to have a major impact, and we hope you don’t miss out. Thanks, Team Biden-Harris

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=269%2E552475%2EwlMB7B)
Peter,
We’re emailing today because we won’t be able to defend PA’s Senate seat without you.
Among the Senate battlegrounds, **Pennsylvania is widely known for expensive campaigns.** Over $373 million dollars was spent in the Commonwealth’s 2022 U.S. Senate race — and we can expect our 2024 race to see just as much spending, if not more.
Mitch McConnell has already confirmed he’s targeting us, so we know we're going to see millions upon millions of right-wing dark money flooding into Pennsylvania. That’s why we have to ask:
[**Will you donate $5 or anything you can spare today to ensure we have the resources to fight back? Every online contribution will matter in our race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230709-1?refcode=em20230709-1&refcode2=269_552475_wlMB7B&akid=269%2E552475%2EwlMB7B)

We’re building our campaign early so that we’re prepared for the long road ahead. Your donation will allow us to host campaign events, air TV ads, hire more staff, and organize voters across Pennsylvania.
Thank you so much,
Team Casey

body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=235%2E52803%2E7YT28q)

| | **BAD NEWS:** Our self-funded, multi-millionaire opponent in Maryland’s U.S. Senate race has already spent roughly **$2 MILLION** on expensive TV ads. **WORSE NEWS:** According to _POLITICO_ , he’s further committed to spending “tens of millions” of his own dollars to continue running TV ads and boosting his statewide campaign. **EVEN WORSE NEWS:** With the July 4th holiday falling smack dab in the middle of the week and our supporters spending more time offline, we’re having one of our slowest fundraising weeks when we can least afford it. **[So please, will you donate any amount toward our $5,000 Rapid Response goal and help counter our opponent’s TV ads? We CANNOT afford to get drowned out this early!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3272?t=9&amount=25&akid=235%2E52803%2E7YT28q)** | | | [Donate Now!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3272?t=10&amount=25&akid=235%2E52803%2E7YT28q)
---
We knew it was going to be a major challenge facing off against an opponent who has broken self-funding records by giving tens of millions to his own congressional campaign, Peter.
**But we didn’t expect him to launch expensive TV ads this early!**
I know this isn’t the best timing. But how we respond _right now_ could decide the outcome of Maryland’s U.S. Senate race, Peter.
**[So please, if you’re able, would you chip in $15 or even $25 toward our Rapid Response goal before midnight? We need to raise $5,000 ASAP if we want to counter these ads and continue spreading our message into every corner of Maryland.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/3272?t=11&amount=15&akid=235%2E52803%2E7YT28q)**

clean_body: | | | BAD NEWS: Our self-funded, multi-millionaire opponent in Maryland’s U.S. Senate race has already spent roughly $2 MILLION on expensive TV ads. WORSE NEWS: According to POLITICO , he’s further committed to spending “tens of millions” of his own dollars to continue running TV ads and boosting his statewide campaign. EVEN WORSE NEWS: With the July 4th holiday falling smack dab in the middle of the week and our supporters spending more time offline, we’re having one of our slowest fundraising weeks when we can least afford it. | | | We knew it was going to be a major challenge facing off against an opponent who has broken self-funding records by giving tens of millions to his own congressional campaign, Peter. But we didn’t expect him to launch expensive TV ads this early! I know this isn’t the best timing. But how we respond right now could decide the outcome of Maryland’s U.S. Senate race, Peter. | | | | | | | | Thanks for hanging in there with us! —Team Alsobrooks | | | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Our campaign is blasting off
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We want to take a moment to thank you all for the incredible response

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=1)
---
Dear Peter - We want to take a moment to thank you all for the incredible response we’ve received since Mr. Kennedy launched his campaign on April 19th in Boston. The past 3 months have been exhilarating, and we couldn’t thank you enough. [**Our Campaign is Blasting Off, Dennis Kucinich on Fox News**](https://www.kennedy24.com/campaign_blasting_off?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=2 "Our Campaign is Blasting Off, Dennis Kucinich on Fox

News") Yesterday, Kennedy 2024 Campaign Manager and longtime progressive leader Dennis Kucinich appeared on Fox News to discuss the campaign’s progress and how we raised an incredible $3 million in 3 days — thanks to all of you! [](https://www.kennedy24.com/campaign_blasting_off?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=3 "Our campaign is Blasting Off Team Kennedy 2023") Kucinich, whose political career spans over 50 years and who served 8 terms in Congress from Ohio, said he’s never seen this groundswell of support for a political campaign in his lifetime. _“I have never seen anything life this...The more people hear Mr. Kennedy, the more they like what they hear and I think he’s the man for the moment,”_ Kucinich told Fox News. Mr. Kennedy’s message of unity and his appeal as an authentic truth-teller is resulting in a broad coalition of support across the political spectrum and our fundraising reflects that. Our momentum is building! [**Thousands of Kennedy Supporters Rally on the Fourth of July!**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y7FcOA9ZofHRqCOTVePZ3Jcrn1ref-EACmF5_Jn-f7SN&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=4 "Kennedy Supporters Rally on the 4th of July!") As Mr. Kennedy’s appeal to the American public takes off, this past week his supporters rallied in countless parades to share his message of hope and unity in their communities. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y7FcOA9ZofHRqCOTVePZ3Jcrn1ref-EACmF5_Jn-f7SN&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=5 "Kennedy Supporters Rally on the 4th of July!") On Independence Day, in small towns and big cities across the nation, from Amherst, New Hampshire to Oak Park, Illinois to Hillsboro, Oregon and Santa Cruz, California, patriots and Kennedy fans young and old spread the news about Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s plan to heal the divide in American politics. Thank you for your incredible support and enthusiasm in helping spread the news about our campaign to your friends and family. [**A Podcast on the CIA, Power, Corruption, War, Freedom, and Meaning with Lex Fridman and RFK, Jr.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/lex_fridman_podcast_388?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=6 "RKF, Jr. on the CIA, Powr, Corruption, War and Freedom

2024") On the 4th of July, Mr. Kennedy sat down with Lex Fridman, the Russian-American computer scientists, podcaster, and research scientist at MIT, to discuss U.S. history, the war in Ukraine, the Cuban Missile Crisis, JFK’s assassination, the CIA’s influence, and his 2024 campaign. If you have time to listen to this podcast, you’ll see why there’s no better candidate in modern history to be the next president of the United States.****[](https://www.kennedy24.com/lex_fridman_podcast_388?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=7) In this interview, RFK, Jr. deftly explains the delicate diplomatic dance that his uncle, President John F. Kennedy, and his father, Robert F. Kennedy, Sr., played with Nikita Khrushchev in October 1962 as the Soviet Union placed nuclear missiles on Cuba, less than a hundred miles off the coast of Florida. This was the greatest threat that America faced at the height of the Cold War, and the Kennedys went against the advice of their own generals and opened diplomatic channels with Krushchev to avoid nuclear war. Now as the U.S. continues to send billions of dollars of weapons, tanks, and missiles to the Ukraine, the world stands on the brink once again — listen as Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. channels the wisdom of peace and reconciliation to a polarized world. There has never been a more urgent time to grow this campaign. While summer is traditionally the time that armies march and wars are waged, we need your support to bring peace, wisdom, and intelligence back to U.S. foreign policy and the White House. Thanks again for your continued support. Team Kennedy
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=8)[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=9)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=10) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=11) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=12) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=13)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_campaign_is_blasting_of3&n=14).

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: 7 upcoming elections
body:
State Democrats make a difference – and we want to keep these victories rolling in. Can you help us get more state Democrats elected in the next few weeks? | | |
---
| | We’re facing down seven upcoming special elections this summer. **That means SEVEN _opportunities_ to elect state Democrats and continue pushing forward progress and pushing back against GOP extremism.** In the past year, we’ve seen Republicans stop at nothing to destroy our democracy, take away women’s freedoms, and deny literal facts. With record-high numbers of anti-LGBTQ+ bills and countless attacks on voting rights, it’s clear that **electing state Democrats is a must for our future.** **Over the next few weeks, we’ll have a chance to do just that – but we need your support to cross the finish line.** [Chip in now to help state Democrats defeat extreme Republican candidates running in upcoming key races across the country » ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4ueOs2BLI6HXmShxTFVMzCzevEEnnTCEqrT6TJBXosTPsqaqr93N1ZCB3up6DgfWphbDR9HMyq1zRL-woKJ08SeTwr9RrW4hOEeEP9vS6jVO9gxEh0IsSN-Uv3U3p22NK925k27RkLB9U5uea-QNi73vpl_atl9F_k0hGxm27sSeXqwXykg5CVsSpeWG8B5bMuctaM5bxheT8s56kpG348thXVJ3rimcZ2zRvMh1FE9448GwTqRzUqFR7bgtlvZs1hwjTf3lim_AwEpKeblGU1NmW8qWyJprkBYr-GKj22DO8K1gSg6MIQsEu-h8p--M3usuVg2N4eQRzKSxmEwmpfo/3xq/vXjV9YGyTMaiGfCJVpVMmQ/h0/bQVPRuGwHmproRAMju9gKvGAYPsLWcQmhlL9AK6EB3A) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66222628/415716048/116974323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDJmNjU0OC1iMzFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KjNeZEdEhNcaFVDQmH1Nt9pvRUY52Hd1_TIs11bgDk4=&emci=54b9f640-b31e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=fd2f6548-b31e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880) Everyone deserves access to clean water and clean air. Over the last decade, our country has seen an unprecedented rise in severe weather that causes damage to our property and infrastructure. Wiley is fighting for climate action in Congress, but it’s going to take all of us working together to make progress. [**Can you sign our petition to send the message to Congress that you stand with Wiley in protecting our planet and taking action on climate change?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66222629/415716049/116974323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDJmNjU0OC1iMzFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KjNeZEdEhNcaFVDQmH1Nt9pvRUY52Hd1_TIs11bgDk4=&emci=54b9f640-b31e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=fd2f6548-b31e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880) **[**SIGN NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66222630/415716050/116974323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDJmNjU0OC1iMzFlLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KjNeZEdEhNcaFVDQmH1Nt9pvRUY52Hd1_TIs11bgDk4=&emci=54b9f640-b31e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=fd2f6548-b31e-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880)** A strong economy and a clean environment go hand in hand. In Congress, Wiley supports investments in “green” jobs and clean energy infrastructure, funding for sustainable transportation initiatives, and a long-term plan toward energy independence. As a State Senator, Wiley pushed for “Polluter Pays” legislation, so that taxpayers aren’t picking up the bill when big polluters spill toxic substances into our air and water. North Carolina is home to diverse ecosystems and in Congress, Wiley continues to support programs that protect our state’s coastlines and wildlife. But like every initiative we fight for in our democracy, it takes grassroots power to make change a reality. **[That’s why we’re asking our supporters to sign on TODAY to help make a difference for our planet.
